Chapter 1240: Where the Rainbow Light Disappears

Li Ping's mind was filled with murderous intent, but soon, the aura emanating from him vanished without a trace.

As the Saint Emperor of Great Qi, he had to maintain an inscrutable expression, regardless of his emotions.

Even if there were no outsiders present, he had to do so.

"Recalling the power of the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao does not necessarily require killing them."

"If they willingly return their power, I would prefer not to shed blood needlessly. But if..."

Li Ping's heart turned cold.

Ruo Mu and Shi Ban, although solitary beings, possessed combat power equivalent to cultivators at the Longevity Realm. Fighting against them would be a good trial run before the decisive battle with the Myriad Immortals Alliance.

"To deal with a powerful foe, one must go all out. I cannot underestimate them."

"Ruo Mu is weaker in strength, so I will start with him. I also need to avoid Shi Ban's notice..."

A plan gradually took shape in the Saint Emperor's mind.

The Earth Vein Ancient Tree, as one of the three major branches of Ruo Mu's descent into the mortal world, would undoubtedly have a specific connection to its source.

After being heavily injured by cultivators, Ruo Mu had gone mad and disappeared from the mortal world.

Perhaps by using the Earth Vein Ancient Tree, he could first locate Ruo Mu's true hiding place. And then weaken his strength.

With a thought, Wang Xuanba appeared in the Saint Emperor's Throne chamber before long.

Having completely devoured the Xuanhuang malevolent thought, Li Ping no longer needed to remain in the small world's mountain peak seal.

After receiving the Saint Emperor's telepathic message not long ago, he had already returned to the Sacred Capital City.

And the heavenly blessings that fell when Li Ping broke through, thanks to the clone's presence in the small world, he also received a small portion.

At this moment, Wang Xuanba's cultivation had reached the verge of Nascent Soul perfection, not far from Divine Transformation.

However, Wang Xuanba's strength was primarily reflected in various exotic beast abilities. Cultivation realms were not that important to him.

"Dao Yi Worms, a type of mutated creature that can erode spiritual wood. Cultivate a sufficient number of them first. I will have great use for them soon."

Wang Xuanba nodded and took the order.

...

Just as Saint Emperor Li Ping was preparing to reveal his brilliance to the Xuanhuang Realm for the first time.

Far away at the other end of the Darkest Star Sea, outside the Xuanxian Boat, Li Fan's Saint Embryo encountered a crisis.

The source of the danger was not from the residual True Immortal power in the star sea, nor from unknown cultivators.

But rather from the Sea of Relics where he was located.

Not long ago, this seemingly stable ruin had inexplicably begun to tremble slightly.

The trembling of the Sea of Relics was secondary. More importantly, when this continuous expanse of ruins ceased to be a monolithic entity, the suction from deeper within the star sea, from the High Wall, became increasingly apparent.

In the eyes of the Saint Embryo Li Fan, the entire starscape was like the tide suddenly rising, sweeping countless gathered relics and dragging them towards the shore.

The Xuanxian Boat activated a special contingency plan.

Even though the Immortal Boat had not manifested and remained hidden in the void, the Saint Embryo Li Fan could still clearly sense the boat's movement.

It was not advancing in a fixed direction, but rather darting and weaving, constantly changing its position.

Like a constantly rotating compass, it deflected the suction from the High Wall.

The Saint Embryo Li Fan initially also considered using this method to resist the suction of the High Wall.

But it was not as easy as it looked.

"The rotation of the Immortal Boat is not just about using itself as a pivot, but it's subtly connected to the entire Sea of Relics. By leveraging these seemingly infinite relics, it barely manages to evade."

The Saint Embryo Li Fan felt a force dragging his body.

Even flying against the suction with his sword, he was slowly losing ground.

Seeing himself drifting further and further away from the Xuanxian Boat, about to be dragged into the depths of the Sea of Relics, the Saint Embryo Li Fan couldn't help but consider the idea of forcefully breaking into the Immortal Boat for refuge.

Even if it meant a difficult battle, it was better than rushing headlong into the invisible High Wall.

Just as he was about to act, from the direction of the Xuanhuang Realm and the Immortal Ruins within the Darkest Star Sea, a multicolored rainbow light suddenly lit up, instantly attracting his attention.

Initially, he was slightly taken aback, but quickly he realized that these were the sixteen Harmonious Dao cultivators summoned by the Myriad Immortals Alliance for the Law Transmitter's summons!

"They're here so quickly?"

The Saint Embryo Li Fan couldn't help but be surprised.

Even considering the unequal time flow in different regions of the star sea, the arrival of this rainbow light was much earlier than Li Fan had anticipated.

"Wait, could it be that this sudden change in suction is specifically to welcome the rainbow light from the Myriad Immortals Alliance?"

Looking at the brilliant streak in the star sea, this thought surfaced in Li Fan's mind.

After a moment of contemplation, he gave up on the futile struggle and followed the suction, flying towards the depths of the star sea.

The speed of the rainbow light was extremely fast, but within the Sea of Relics filled with ruins, it inevitably slowed down.

Li Fan, on the other hand, protected himself with his sword array and quietly followed.

Li Fan initially thought that the scope of the Sea of Relics should be limited.

But after following for about three days of Xuanhuang Realm time, and still not leaving this continuous expanse of ruins, Li Fan finally gained a rough understanding of the ancient scale of the immortal cultivation world in the Darkest Star Sea.

Beyond the relics, there was no end in sight, with no distinction between north, south, east, or west.

But the Myriad Immortals Alliance's rainbow light clearly had a special guide, always maintaining a fixed direction.

And the route they took seemed to have been carefully calculated, avoiding dangerous areas within the ruins.

Thanks to them, the Saint Embryo Li Fan also followed smoothly.

Another four days passed.

The dense, fragmented relics ahead suddenly became sparse.

Li Fan's spirit was lifted, knowing that he was close to exiting the Sea of Relics.

With no obstacles, the rainbow light gradually accelerated.

In just half a day, Li Fan witnessed a scene that would be forever etched in his memory.

A Great Wall stood in the darkness ahead.

Initially, Li Fan thought this was the so-called High Wall.

But after observing the details of the Great Wall, Li Fan suddenly understood.

The "bricks" that made up the endless, seemingly endless city wall were, in fact, shattered worlds!

Like the ruins and relics in the Sea of Relics, what lay ahead was the ruins of worlds!

Li Fan estimated that even if the Xuanhuang Realm, which had devoured numerous cultivation world fragments and was far larger than in ancient times, was only a minuscule section of this Great Wall of Collapsed Realms.

"How many immortal cultivation worlds perished in the ancient calamities?"

"And by what power were they all gathered here?"

"The High Wall..."

Li Fan strained his eyes, trying to find the fabled High Wall, which he had only heard of but never seen.

But in the darkness, aside from countless fragments of worlds, he saw no other anomalies.

After a brief moment of distraction, Li Fan found that he still couldn't control himself from flying towards the ruined realm,

And his speed was increasing.

"If I were to smash into it head-on like this, even with my Heavenly God Sword Body, I would perish." Li Fan frowned inwardly.

But he quickly locked onto the Myriad Immortals Alliance's rainbow light ahead of him.

For some reason, that rainbow light showed no intention of slowing down.

Instead, it actively accelerated, darting towards the front.

"This..."

After a moment of thought, the Saint Embryo Li Fan decisively followed closely behind.

"The Law Transmitter spent so much effort gathering these Harmonious Dao cultivators, they wouldn't just let them die for nothing, would they?"

As if confirming Li Fan's speculation, after venturing a distance into the Sea of Relics, the rainbow light, ignoring the suction of the High Wall, suddenly changed direction and flew into one of the world fragments.

It was as if there was an attraction there, more powerful than the resonating star power of the High Wall.

A sense of unease inexplicably flashed through the Saint Embryo Li Fan's mind.

"Law Transmission Heavenly Venerate?"

As he approached the location where the rainbow light had turned, he also sensed that power.

However, under the warning in his heart, the Saint Embryo Li Fan did not follow and fly over.

Instead, he continued to fly deeper into the Sea of Relics for a while. Due to the possible influence of the Law Transmitter's power, Li Fan's speed gradually slowed down.

Finally, he found a stable point and managed to stabilize himself.

However, Li Fan also knew that this stability was only temporary.

As soon as the suspected Law Transmitter's power disappeared, he would once again be uncontrollably drawn towards the High Wall.

Li Fan attempted to fly into the ruined world nearby to take shelter.

Alas, the remains of these worlds clearly would not provide protection to cultivators like the Xuanhuang Realm did.

"It seems my end is near."

Just as the Saint Embryo Li Fan was thinking this, not far away, at the destination of the Myriad Immortals Alliance's rainbow light.

The sudden disappearance of an aura sent a jolt through him.

Before he could react, the second, then the third Harmonious Dao cultivator's aura vanished.

Harmonious Dao cultivators, even if they were hastily cultivated, were still supreme existences below the Longevity Realm.

Beings that countless cultivators dreamed of.

But at this moment, within the dark void, inside the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms, not even a trace of struggle or sound could be heard. They died silently.

"What's going on?"

"Did the Law Transmitter make the move?"

"After all that effort to summon them, only to slaughter them?"

While the Saint Embryo Li Fan was filled with doubt and confusion, the rate at which Harmonious Dao cultivators disappeared from the Myriad Immortals Alliance's rainbow light did not decrease.

In the blink of an eye, all sixteen Harmonious Dao cultivators were dead.

"If they die here, will they still return to Heaven?" the Saint Embryo Li Fan suddenly wondered.

"Wait, return to Heaven..."

Li Fan suddenly thought of something and quickly focused his attention, sensing the area where the rainbow light had disappeared.

Although the cultivators' life force had vanished, the power of the laws of heaven and earth still faintly existed there.

But they were gradually weakening in a rhythmic pattern, like ice slowly melting into water.

"This is..." Li Fan's heart trembled, and he finally understood what had just happened.

And then, the turbulent Sea of Collapsed Realms surprisingly became steady again for some unknown reason.

This further confirmed Li Fan's judgment.

"By using the Earth and Heaven's Souls within the Harmonious Dao cultivators' bodies to repair the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms?"

Li Fan was both shocked and enraged.

"Such a grand effort, all for 'robbing Peter to pay Paul'?"

Li Fan felt utterly absurd.

But then, the complete stabilization of the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms, and the gradual weakening of the High Wall's resonating star power,

Forced him to believe it all.

Although he desperately wanted to rush to the spot where the rainbow light had disappeared to investigate,

The Saint Embryo Li Fan was not yet prepared to face the Law Transmitter directly. Especially since his Saint Embryo body was also formed from the Law of the Sword in the Xuanhuang Realm.

Rushing over rashly would likely lead to the same fate as those sixteen Harmonious Dao cultivators, becoming mere materials for repairing the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms.

Although the Saint Embryo Li Fan did not fear death, dying so ignominiously was truly vexing.

"The great turmoil in the Xuanhuang Realm originated from the resonating star power of the High Wall."

"Based on the current scene, the resonating star power and the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms seem to have reached a subtle balance. Under normal circumstances, it would not be enough to spread to the Xuanhuang Realm."

"So, it must be that the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms was externally disturbed, breaking the balance, thus causing the great turmoil in the star sea?"

"..."

"This ancient, continuous ruin of worlds, unexpectedly faces imbalance."

The Saint Embryo Li Fan couldn't help but recall when he had destroyed a collapsed realm within the Chasm of the Abyss in the Xuanhuang Realm.

Then, a figure suspected to be the Law Transmitter appeared and used new world fragments to repair it.

"Could it be that this action caused the subsequent series of changes?"

A wry smile flashed through Li Fan's mind.

"What is this? Breaking the east wall to repair the west wall? Then breaking the west wall to repair the east wall?"

After some contemplation, Li Fan felt that this was indeed a highly probable scenario.

"After all, based on the current reality, he actually managed to avert this catastrophe."

"..."

Li Fan fell silent.

He carefully recalled and re-examined the details of the event.

"There are still some strange aspects."

"Since the state of the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms can be so easily broken, the Law Transmitter should have been extremely cautious when taking world fragments back then. Acting so rashly and without foresight is simply not like the Law Transmitter's style."

"Unless, the operational mechanism of the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms is too mysterious, and even the Law Transmitter only has a partial understanding. Or else..."

"The node within the Chasm of the Abyss is of paramount importance to the Xuanhuang Realm and cannot be lost. Therefore, even if it caused an imbalance in the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms, the Law Transmitter had no choice but to act."

The Saint Embryo Li Fan's thoughts raced.

With the current conditions, it was impossible to determine which conjecture was correct.

But it was now certain that the Law Transmission Heavenly Venerate, or perhaps the Heavenly Physician, was within this Great Wall of Collapsed Realms.

The Saint Embryo Li Fan cautiously concealed his aura again, refraining from any rash actions, and quietly hid himself.

Fortunately, the energy here was chaotic and complex.

Although the resonating star power was suppressed by the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms, it had already rippled through the void like waves,

Effectively concealing the faint fluctuation that Li Fan had left exposed.

After patiently waiting for more than ten days, until the sense of foreboding in his heart completely disappeared.

The Saint Embryo Li Fan slowly flew towards the direction where the rainbow light had vanished.

He flew very slowly, a distance that could normally be covered in the blink of an eye, taking him half a day.

Once he was sure that no one was around, Li Fan began to examine the small world he was in.

It seemed no different from the other world fragments in the vicinity.

But for some reason, Li Fan felt a sense of familiarity with this place.

"What is it..."

After a while, Li Fan suddenly realized.

"A part of the Congyun Sea, or perhaps a fragment of the Heavenly Law Realm with a very similar aura..."

Chapter 1241: Cat Treasure Double Change

"A part of the Congyun Sea, or perhaps a fragment of the Heavenly Law Realm with a very similar aura..."

Li Fan had previously used the Vast Sea Pearl to establish his foundation and merged his consciousness with the Congyun Sea.

In this life, the Saint Emperor clone had directly devoured the residual consciousness of the Congyun Sea, so Li Fan was very familiar with the Congyun land.

Therefore, even though this world fragment was now a desolate and silent wasteland,

After standing there for a moment, Li Fan still sensed that familiar trace.

Li Fan suddenly realized: "Perhaps the reason why the Law Transmitter made a move to repair it, and why it is their homeland, is related."

Walking through the ruins of the Heavenly Law Realm, although thousands of years had passed, the terrifying traces of the world's destruction could still be clearly seen.

No complete structures could be found on the surface, only scattered remnants of walls. Occasionally, cultivator corpses could be seen in the ruins. Judging by their postures, they did not seem to have died in combat with others.

"It seems the calamity occurred very suddenly, leaving no time for even a struggle."

Although Li Fan had destroyed the Xuanhuang Realm using various methods, each time after the Xuanhuang Realm was destroyed, Li Fan had returned to the peak of Dissolution Mountain and witnessed the end of the world personally only a few times.

A sense of oppression inexplicably arose in the Saint Embryo Li Fan's heart.

It was not because his state of mind had been shaken, but rather a visceral reaction that arose spontaneously in such an environment.

This world fragment was not very large, and Li Fan soon searched it all, finding no valuable clues.

"However, this remnant realm is relatively well-preserved. Currently, the Law Transmitter is hesitant to act for fear of disrupting the balance of the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms. I suppose they will eventually take it away."

"This place is not suitable for lingering."

Li Fan was decisive and quietly left the area.

After some thought, he did not return directly to the outside of the Xuanxian Boat, but instead chose to live in seclusion within this Great Wall of Collapsed Realms.

Firstly, because there was already a clone of his consciousness lurking within the Xuanxian Boat, controlling Zhao Xian, so he did not need to act personally at the moment.

Secondly, because...

"The upper limit of the laws here has increased again."

"Is it because it's closer to the High Wall? Or because of the remnants of the myriad realms?"

"If we disregard environmental factors, this is truly a good place for enlightenment and cultivation."

The Saint Embryo Li Fan, having achieved his Dao foundation and cave-heaven through the Xuanhuang Sword Dao, was extremely sensitive to laws.

If the Xuanhuang Realm, in its complete state, was a low point in the highest law limit of the Darkest Star Sea, then this place, the Collapsed Realm of Longevity, was the peak of the highest law limit in the entire star sea.

Even though it was affected by the resonating star power, making the rhythm of the laws difficult to capture, and it was inherently incomplete and chaotic.

However, if one could seize the fleeting opportunity to comprehend it, then enlightenment gained in a single moment would surpass a hundred years of arduous cultivation.

"The supreme principles of the mortal realm were crudely torn apart by the True Immortal script power from the Immortal Realm, scattered throughout the star sea."

"For latecomers like me who survived, it is easier to perceive and comprehend. Under normal circumstances..."

Fragments of light and shadow from interactions between immortal cultivation worlds in the ancient Xuanhuang Realm, glimpsed occasionally through the Scarlet River in the Immortal Extermination Realm during the 119th life, flashed through the Saint Embryo Li Fan's mind.

"Back then, all realms still existed, and everything was orderly. For cultivators, not to mention comprehending, even trying to get in touch with these supreme dark principles was extremely difficult. Those who had the chance to encounter them through fortunate coincidence would likely have hope for the immortal path."

The Saint Embryo Li Fan's thoughts flowed slowly, and countless insights into enlightenment surged into his heart.

Fearing that his sword light might attract the Law Transmitter and the Heavenly Physician possibly lurking within the Great Wall of Collapsed Realms, despite having myriad inspirations, Li Fan did not actually manifest them.

He merely simulated them in his mind.

Even so, it filled him with joy.

At the same time, a thought surfaced: "By lingering here for extended periods, it seems the cultivation of the Law Transmitter and the Heavenly Physician should have reached the peak of the mortal realm."

He had suspected this during his journey through the star sea.

Now he was completely certain of this conjecture.

He had no doubts about the talent of the Law Transmitter and the Heavenly Physician.

Their ability to comprehend the supreme laws of the star sea was undoubtedly higher than that of the Saint Embryo.

However, compared to before, the slight apprehension in Li Fan's heart had vanished.

"They have indeed reached the limit of the Darkest Star Sea, but that is all. The immortal path is broken, and ascension to immortality is hopeless..."

A faint glimmer flashed in Li Fan's eyes.

The reason why people considered the Law Transmission Heavenly Venerate to be invincible was because they were unaware of his actual cultivation realm.

Because of the unknown, they felt fear and confusion.

Although Li Fan had vague guesses before, True Immortal below, peak of the mortal realm.

But Li Fan could not concretely quantify the difference between this peak realm and the Longevity realm.

However, now, standing at the foot of the High Wall and personally sensing the upper limit of power in this Darkest Star Sea, Li Fan's doubts were completely dispelled.

With a goal in mind, it became easier to pursue it.

Li Fan also felt fortunate that after thousands of years, the Law Transmitter and the Heavenly Physician remained at this realm. It was because the star sea's upper limit was indeed this high. It was equivalent to their cultivation having stagnated for a long time, indirectly giving Li Fan time to catch up.

"Moreover, with the True Immortal of the Immortal Ruins present, even if they found a method to break through the mortal realm, they would have to consider it carefully for the safety of the Xuanhuang Realm."

"The tortoise wins the race, not the rabbit."

The Saint Embryo Li Fan cast aside distracting thoughts and focused on comprehending the supreme laws of the star sea that were wandering in this place.

...

Xuanhuang Realm.

After a period of cultivation, Wang Xuanba had successfully cultivated a sufficient number of the Dao Yi Worms that the Saint Emperor had ordered.

"Heavenly spiritual woods all have their own effects. My little worms have another marvelous use: after they devour them, the spiritual trees do not die directly. Instead, they gradually transform into worm-infested spiritual woods. The original consciousness can choose freely whether to retain it or not. One can even merge the sources of other consciousnesses into the Dao Yi worm swarm, achieving a state similar to a clone," Wang Xuanba boasted with some self-satisfaction to Ou Shangtian.

"Alas, I still find the path of exotic beast transformation more interesting. This formation array is truly boring," Ou Shangtian's eyes flashed with envy.

Wang Xuanba smiled, with a hint of schadenfreude. "Who told you, little brother, to be overly ambitious, wanting to learn everything you see, thus displeasing Master."

"Yes, until my understanding of formations reaches Master's requirements, I cannot be half-hearted. Alas, it seems like a distant and uncertain prospect." Ou Shangtian sighed.

"Oh, right. Master also said before that in the future, he will use me as bait to lure out a hidden expert in the Xuanhuang Realm. That person is not weak; if my formation skills are not proficient enough, I might even be in mortal danger. I wonder if that's true." Ou Shangtian said somewhat carelessly.

Wang Xuanba's expression changed upon hearing this. "Junior brother, do not speak such nonsense! Since Master said so, it must be true. You've also seen Senior Xu Ke before. The hidden experts in the Xuanhuang Realm should not be underestimated. Junior brother, you must take this seriously!"

Ou Shangtian nodded in agreement on the surface, but still felt somewhat unconvinced inwardly.

He had also seen Xu Ke. But he was just a decaying old man on the verge of death.

Although his strength was far greater than Ou Shangtian's, with the Seven-Colored Jade Void Flowing Light in his possession, if he wanted to escape, Xu Ke wouldn't be able to stop him!

"I want to see just how powerful the expert Master mentioned truly is!"

Beneath the Saint Emperor's Throne, within the Sacred Dynasty's treasure vault.

Li Ping glanced slightly towards the location of Ou Shangtian and Wang Xuanba and shook his head.

He naturally sensed Ou Shangtian's thoughts.

Youthful arrogance, coupled with possessing numerous divine artifacts, was understandable.

"However, if one does not diligently study formations and relies solely on the Seven-Colored Divine Light, escaping from Shi Ban might be quite difficult."

He chuckled inwardly, having no intention of reminding him again.

It would be good for him to suffer a setback. Shi Ban would not rashly kill him.

As long as Shi Ban appeared, Li Ping would naturally deal with him.

After collecting the Stone Tablet and dealing with Ruo Mu, Li Ping put this matter aside for now and gently stroked the orange kitten lying on his shoulder.

Compared to before, Cat Treasure had grown a size larger.

Its fur had gone from sparse to dense, becoming soft and lustrous.

What concerned the Saint Emperor even more was Cat Treasure's second transformation.

Previously, Cat Treasure could transform into a small square box, and the light emitted from the box could replicate anything it enveloped.

Its limits were still unclear, but at least it could replicate [World Artifacts] refined from the power of a world without issue, though it might consume excessive energy.

And not long ago, when Wang Xuanba brought the Dao Yi Worms that had devoured spiritual wood to report to the Saint Emperor, Li Ping felt Cat Treasure's thoughts being transmitted to him for the first time.

After Wang Xuanba left, Li Ping began to conduct experiments.

He placed a mass of approximately tens of thousands of Dao Yi Worms before Cat Treasure.

Initially, Cat Treasure seemed somewhat fearful, observing from afar. But its eyes betrayed a longing.

Taking two steps forward and one step back, Cat Treasure slowly approached the Dao Yi Worm swarm.

The Dao Yi Worms, usually highly sensitive to foreign objects, showed no reaction to Cat Treasure's approach.

Finally reaching the worm swarm, a faint blue light emanated from Cat Treasure, and before Li Ping's watchful eyes, it transformed into a blue sphere of light.

It enveloped the Dao Yi Worms.

The worm swarm within the blue sphere seemed to be instantly frozen, entering a state of stasis.

And on the surface of the sphere, various views of the Dao Yi Worm's body structure flashed intermittently.

Li Ping's expression grew serious.

The sphere did not last long, as this form seemed to consume an extreme amount of energy.

Before long, Cat Treasure reverted to its small kitten form and returned to Li Ping's side.

It lay lazily on Li Ping's shoulder.

The previously immobile Dao Yi Worms then resumed their movement.

However, they remained completely unaware of what had happened to them throughout the entire process.

"It's not that the Dao Yi Worms have too low intelligence. Even if they were transformed into cultivators of the Xuanhuang Realm, the result would likely be the same."

"This blue light from Cat Treasure..."

It was a mysterious power Li Ping had never seen before.

With a thought, he patted Cat Treasure.

The little orange cat, though somewhat unwilling, seemed to muster its spirits thanks to Li Ping's prolonged feeding of golden Origin Force essence.

The blue light enveloped its body and then instantly shattered.

A moment later, Cat Treasure transformed into a swarm of Dao Yi Worms!

Identical to the swarm earlier, encased in the blue sphere not far away!

The entire transformation process occurred right before Li Ping's eyes, yet he couldn't find any difference between the two.

"It's not a transformation technique, but a complete change of life form, which is why no difference can be detected."

Even though he considered himself the Destined Saint Emperor, the Xuanhuang Spirit, Li Ping couldn't help but sigh with genuine admiration at this seemingly miraculous technique.

"Furthermore, the transformation is not limited to just replicating the original body. It can also evolve completely based on the characteristics of the replicated subject."

Li Ping seemed to have a realization, and another point of golden light appeared at his fingertip.

Cat Treasure understood Li Ping's intention. The Dao Yi Worm swarm suddenly expanded, and visibly, from tens of thousands, it instantly swelled to hundreds of thousands, increasing its numbers tenfold.

The Dao Yi Worm swarm, transformed from Cat Treasure, returned to Li Ping's side as if seeking praise.

After receiving permission, the blue light shattered, and it reverted back to its orange cat form.

Happily, it began to gobble down the Origin Force essence.

"This is also a form of replication. However, it replicates living beings, and it can even evolve based on Cat Treasure's own transformations."

"Such a technique..."

Li Ping fell silent.

In his memory, perhaps only treasures from the Immortal Realm could achieve this.

But he couldn't sense any trace of Immortal Spiritual Energy from Cat Treasure.

"Beyond the high wall..."

A fact that had to be admitted was already clear.

"I just don't know what level of treasure this Cat Treasure is, outside the high wall."

Li Ping's resolve was firm; he did not waver despite the potential gap between what was inside and outside the high wall.

"Item replication, creature simulation... I wonder if Cat Treasure has other functions?"

Trying to find answers from the little orange cat, Li Ping discovered that Cat Treasure itself knew little about its own abilities.

It would only automatically learn when conditions were met.

"And not all creatures are willing for Cat Treasure to replicate or simulate them."

"I tried with some ordinary exotic beasts, but it showed no reaction. Only strange existences like the Dao Yi Worms would arouse its interest."

Li Ping gently stroked the treasure from beyond the high wall, and various uses flashed through his mind.

"This Cat Treasure, although it has no offensive capabilities, its value is far greater than purely destructive treasures."

As if sensing Li Ping's thoughts, the little orange cat let out a proud meow.

Seven days later, Wang Xuanba arrived in the Xuanhuang Realm carrying a wooden box.

With his feet on the ground, Wang Xuanba closed his eyes and sensed the flowing Earth Vein power deep beneath the surface.

"Here's a little appetizer for you. The main course is yet to come."

A smile appeared on Wang Xuanba's face, and he transformed into a black shadow, drilling into the ground.

In an instant, he reached the extreme depths underground.

The flowing Earth Vein power formed a defense, preventing him from getting closer.

He even vaguely sensed a wisp of consciousness scanning him.

Wang Xuanba sneered inwardly and broke the wooden box.

A mass of shadow instantly flew towards the yellow Earth Vein.

The protective layer was like paper, easily gnawed through.

(This chapter is incomplete and contains no further content.)

Chapter 1242: The Heavenly Dao as Nourishment

"Originally intended as a protective force for the Earth Veins, after being devoured by the Dao Yi Worms, it instead became nourishment."

What was initially a mass of black shadow the size of a fist, instantly spread like thick ink dissolving in water, gradually dyeing the surging river of Earth Veins black.

Even more bizarrely, the black torrent, after being eroded by the Dao Yi Worms, aside from its color difference, had the same aura and energy fluctuations as the previous yellow Earth Veins. Pure perception could not detect such an anomaly.

However, Wang Xuanba, who had a clone within the Dao Yi Worm swarm, could clearly feel the terrifying speed of the swarm's growth and expansion.

Following the Earth Veins, centered around Yueyang Prefecture, it vigorously spread to various parts of the Xuanhuang Realm.

In addition to horizontal expansion, in the vertical space, the Dao Yi Worms also continuously eroded downwards along the roots of the densely packed inverted trees.

"The wonders of creation, to this extent. If not for Master's guidance, I would probably never have thought that such a large tree was hidden beneath the Xuanhuang Realm." Wang Xuanba marveled inwardly.

Through the images transmitted from the bodies of the Dao Yi Worms, Wang Xuanba saw the originally dense but stationary roots, as they were continuously blackened, gradually seemed to come alive, shaking slightly.

A vast consciousness swept back and forth within those blackened parts. Compared to before, there was more uncertainty and surprise. Wang Xuanba knew that should be the consciousness of the Earth Vein Ancient Tree.

But it was destined to be in vain. Before these mutant Dao Yi Worms had fully burrowed and activated their complete metamorphosis, the Earth Vein Ancient Tree could not possibly detect the fact that its body was being infiltrated.

"Despite knowing that there was a problem with its body, it couldn't find the cause. As the condition worsened, fear and despair accumulated. The saying that attacking the mind is the best strategy, Master's plan is truly brilliant." Wang Xuanba sneered slightly, feeling it was about time, and then issued a command in his heart.

The surging dark shadow worm tide, which was rapidly expanding, instantly froze. The Dao Yi worm swarm fell into hibernation. It lurked in the body of the Earth Vein Ancient Tree.

The yellow Earth Vein power continued to wash over, as if suppressing the shadow. However, the black color did not disappear, still settling at the bottom of the yellow.

If viewed macroscopically, it was like a dim spot had appeared in the Xuanhuang Earth Veins.

"Master said that the Earth Veins ultimately affect all living beings on the surface, and any slight change could cause landslides and ground collapse. If handled improperly, it could even provoke the hostility of the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao..."

Wang Xuanba seemed to have indeed vaguely sensed the anomaly in the will of heaven and earth just now. However, as the Dao Yi worm swarm hibernated, this anomaly quickly disappeared.

"Interesting." Wang Xuanba narrowed his eyes and meditated on the spot for a moment.

Then, he rushed to the next Earth Vein node without delay. He had to plant sixteen such black spots within the body of the Xuanhuang Earth Vein Ancient Tree.

The plan proceeded smoothly.

Except for the last few times, when the increasingly uneasy Ancient Tree spontaneously triggered violent Earth Vein currents, causing him minor injuries. The remaining worm shadows were all perfectly placed.

Even the Earth Vein Ancient Tree's struggle, if it sensed anything, was ultimately futile. Instead, it caused the speed of the Dao Yi worm swarm's spread in the Earth Veins to surge, and the shadow spot was visibly larger than in other places.

Half a month later, Wang Xuanba, having completed his mission perfectly, returned to the Saint Capital City.

In the Saint Emperor's Throne, Li Ping's disciples were already waiting.

Wang Xuanba was somewhat surprised. These senior and junior brothers and sisters all cultivated according to Master's teachings and rarely had the chance to meet. Some Wang Xuanba had never even met, only hearing that Master had taken in such a disciple. He did not expect them all to be gathered here today.

"It seems Master is finally going to make a big move." Wang Xuanba immediately became somewhat excited.

Striding to the front of the Saint Emperor, Wang Xuanba knelt on one knee and reported his mission progress.

The Faceless Saint Emperor lightly waved his hand and helped Wang Xuanba up.

"Well done."

Wang Xuanba, who rarely heard praise from the Saint Emperor, couldn't help but hold his head high.

"With sixteen groups of Dao Yi Worms implanted, the Earth Vein Ancient Tree is doomed. Which of you will subdue this tree for your teacher?" Li Ping then asked indifferently.

The six people in the hall all loudly declared, "This disciple is willing to share Master's worries!"

Li Ping looked at these disciples, all speaking from the bottom of their hearts, and nodded with satisfaction.

There were six disciples, three men and three women.

They were Sun Erlang, Su Yuqing, Wang Xuanba, Lin Ling, Ou Shangtian, and the Daoist child Liuli.

The first five had been Li Ping's disciples for some time and had been meticulously trained. As for the Daoist child Liuli, Li Ping decided on the spur of the moment after discovering the divinity of Cat Treasure.

However, Li Ping himself had no malicious intent. He merely planned to cultivate her and then, through Liuli's special connection with the Fishing Pond, seek more treasures from the Fishing Pond. Li Ping's intentions were sincere, and he told her directly. Moreover, Daoist child Liuli was very sensitive to people's feelings. After sensing Li Ping's honest intentions, she gradually accepted and became accustomed to the existence of this Master.

Furthermore, Zhong Shentong kept chattering, telling her to obey the Saint Emperor's orders. Coupled with Daoist Hundred Blossoms occasionally giving Liuli extra lessons, this little Daoist child progressed faster than all other disciples.

Speaking of Zhong Shentong, since arriving in the Sacred Dynasty of Great Qi, he had completely embraced his favorite 'lying flat' lifestyle. The continuously rising spiritual energy concentration in the Sacred Dynasty allowed him to live comfortably for several more decades even without breaking through his current realm, so he decided to completely slack off and stop cultivating.

With the Saint Emperor's special permission, he now spent his days happily fishing in the Fishing Pond, truly living a life that others envied.

Returning to the Saint Emperor's Throne, facing the Saint Emperor's task, all the disciples were eager to try.

Li Ping, however, had already made up his mind.

"Lin Ling, you go with Xuanba. If the Ancient Tree is sensible, then so be it. If it remains stubborn..."

Li Ping smiled, "You can replace it."

Lin Ling, the manifestation of the Spirit Wood Realm, had been conquering other small worlds for the Sacred Dynasty since being enlightened by Li Ping in this life. The killing intent emanating from her was unconcealed and as substantial as if it were real, making Lin Ling the most awe-inspiring among Li Ping's six disciples.

Li Ping assigned the task to her, and others had no objections.

The Faceless Saint Emperor handed a wheel-shaped magic artifact to Lin Ling in mid-air. "With this wheel, you can freely control the Dao Yi Worms. The worms are already deep within the tree, and the Earth Vein Ancient Tree should have no resistance. However, be wary of it making a desperate struggle..."

After a few simple instructions, Li Ping watched Lin Ling and Wang Xuanba leave the Saint Emperor's Throne.

The hall fell silent for a moment.

It was Ou Shangtian who, mustering his courage, asked, "Master, that matter you mentioned earlier you would assign to me..."

Li Ping smiled, "Soon. Just be prepared."

The remaining three disciples also turned their gazms towards him.

Sun Erlang, as Li Ping's eldest disciple, had long been assisting in managing the affairs of the Sacred Dynasty. He knew that his Master had been planning for a long time, and this sudden move meant it was far from just this one matter.

"Erlang." As expected, Li Ping spoke.

"This disciple is here."

"Go to the Five Elders Council for me."

Sun Erlang was stunned.

He had envisioned many possible conquests to follow, but he never expected his Master to send him to the Five Elders Council.

The name was unfamiliar to most people in the Sacred Dynasty. Sun Erlang had only learned about it from Yi Shu before.

"Ask them if they know anything about the matter with Eastern Pole Heavenly Venerate from back then."

Li Ping transmitted an image into Sun Erlang's mind.

"Eastern Pole?" Sun Erlang had never heard the name before. But given that he was a Heavenly Venerate, his strength should be at the Longevity Realm.

Therefore, when Sun Erlang saw the image in his mind, even with his firm and tenacious disposition honed from two lifetimes, he couldn't help but tremble.

Li Ping, unconcerned by Sun Erlang's reaction, accepted the instruction: "The Five Elders Council, unlike the Myriad Immortals Alliance, is covered by the power of Heavenly Venerates. They rule by dividing territories. You are to go to the territory of the [True Heavenly Venerate]. As for the other Heavenly Venerates, do not provoke them..."

Sun Erlang firmly kept his Master's instructions in mind.

Like Lin Ling, Sun Erlang also received a treasure as a reward before leaving.

"With the Dao-Transformation Stone, you already possess the greatest magical artifact. Relying on other external objects would only lead you astray," Li Ping said, slowly handing a sparkling, crystalline stone to Sun Erlang.

In his sea of consciousness, the Dao-Transformation Stone suddenly emitted an unprecedented blue light, followed by a surge of greed and agitation.

A yearning from his soul made Sun Erlang unable and unwilling to suppress it.

"Another Dao-Transformation Stone? And it's of better quality than the one in my sea of consciousness! At least it's mid-grade or above." Sun Erlang was ecstatic.

Having spent a long time accompanying Yi Shu of the Taiyan Sect touring the Sacred Dynasty, Sun Erlang naturally understood the preciousness of Dao-Transformation Stones. There were very few left in the world, and they were all basically occupied by cultivators with deep fortunes. Outsiders could not find them. And now, his Master was actually giving him a mid-grade one...

Sun Erlang immediately kowtowed to thank his Master.

The joy in his heart directly dispelled the fear he had felt from the situation with Eastern Pole Heavenly Venerate.

"Absorb it slowly. The sublimation of the Dao-Transformation Stone will in turn empower your abilities across the board. Of course, if you want to maximize the potential of the Dao-Transformation Stone, other rare treasures might be needed."

Li Ping's majestic voice echoed in the hall: "The foundation of the Five Elders Council lies with the Ten Immortal Sects of ancient times. Though their names are gone, their essence remains. Within their numerous treasure vaults, you might find something."

"I obey Master's command." Sun Erlang nodded and departed.

Among his disciples, Li Ping had the most special feelings for Sun Erlang. This assignment, in addition to indeed wanting to use him to exert influence, was also because Li Ping vaguely sensed that Sun Erlang's destiny lay in this direction. This premonition was very mysterious, not a deduction based on sufficient known information, but more like the intuitive guidance a cultivator experiences just before breaking through.

Daoist child Liuli, seeing that her senior brothers and sisters had all received treasures, couldn't help but look at Li Ping with anticipation, her large eyes fixed on him.

Su Yuqing, however, had the most subdued reaction among them all. Perhaps it was because the child in her womb had not yet been born.

Su Yuqing's mind recalled what Master had told her before: "The fetus in your womb is actually the manifestation of this small world's Heavenly Dao."

"This realm is facing destruction, thus borrowing your body to seek a glimmer of hope. However, even with the Heavenly Dao of the small world accompanying you, you are still a mortal. Your body is too weak. Even if you are lucky enough to give birth to this child, she will not be able to grow up, and you will surely die."

"Unless you cultivate with me..."

Since that day, Su Yuqing had come to the Sacred Dynasty of Great Qi.

As her cultivation realm grew higher, the weakness of her original body gradually disappeared. And the fetus in her womb became more stable.

However, Master had said that the stronger she was at the time of childbirth, the higher her daughter's future achievements would be. As a mother, Su Yuqing's persistent pursuit of cultivation realm ranked first among the six disciples.

She had no particular deep obsession with conquering and earning merits in battle.

Li Ping's attention was locked onto the two people in the hall who had not yet been given specific arrangements, and he remained silent for a long time.

This made Daoist child Liuli sense something and she nervously lowered her head, withdrawing her expectant gaze.

"The two of you have compatible personalities. Being together will benefit each other. Furthermore, due to your special physiques, it is not advisable to come into contact with too much killing intent..."

"I have recently opened up a special small world. The two of you can help me there."

Daoist child Liuli immediately put on a sad face.

Perhaps because she was raised by Zhong Shentong, her temperament was very similar to his. If not forced by external forces, she would be quite lazy. Since Li Ping had taken her as a disciple, he naturally had to correct this bad habit.

After Ou Shangtian left, Liuli and Su Yuqing followed Li Ping to the newly opened small world.

"Master Tiger, it's too dark here. Liuli is a little scared!" Liuli deliberately spoke with a lisp, sounding pitiful.

But this was not Liuli pretending to be pitiful. It was because this world was truly different from ordinary small worlds, with no trace of light. This was because Li Ping, along with Tian Yang and Xu Ke, had jointly created this special world specifically for the You Clan members.

"Yuqing, besides the darkness, do you sense any other differences here?" Li Ping asked, completely ignoring Liuli's feigned misery.

Absolute darkness and tranquil silence seemed to put the fetus in Su Yuqing's womb into a state of reduced activity, as if hypnotized, gradually falling asleep.

Su Yuqing sensed the emotions from her daughter and replied with a frown after a while, "The Heavenly Dao of this small world... is incomplete? Or rather, nonexistent?"

"It's just a vast space. In my humble opinion, this place doesn't even deserve to be called a world."

Su Yuqing truly had extraordinary talent. In just a moment, she sensed the anomaly here.

Li Ping smiled, "You've only answered half of it correctly. This place originally did not lack the consciousness of a small world's Heavenly Dao. Although it was very weak, it did exist."

Su Yuqing was stunned and was about to ask where the Heavenly Dao of this world had gone.

Suddenly, a golden cube appeared before her. Its dazzling light illuminated the entire dark small world.

And sensing the somewhat familiar aura within the golden cube, Su Yuqing suddenly felt an uncontrollable sense of fear.

The fetus in her womb was startled awake and began to writhe restlessly.

This was because the golden cube contained the sealed consciousness of the world's Heavenly Dao, which was essentially the same as her!

"They all received gifts, so you naturally won't be left out." Li Ping's voice sounded again.

"Here, it needs to be under my absolute control, and there is no need for the consciousness of the world's Heavenly Dao, so I stripped it away and sealed it."

"I am giving it to you now." Li Ping said indifferently.

Chapter 1243: Drawing the Sword Towards Ruomu

The golden cube shone brightly, and Li Ping's voice echoed endlessly in this absolutely dark small world.

As the initial instinctive fear subsided, Su Yuqing felt an irresistible, extreme craving for the sealed item within the golden cube.

Even the fetus in her womb felt the same.

"You and this nascent Heavenly Dao consciousness are, in a sense, similar beings. Use the method I teach you to slowly refine and absorb it, and it may be equivalent to several hundred years of arduous cultivation."

As Li Ping's voice sounded again, a profound and mystical technique also appeared in Su Yuqing's mind.

It was like a secret technique, or a formation, or perhaps both. It was extremely profound, and even with Su Yuqing's comprehension, it was difficult to understand.

"This realm has great significance to me and the entire Great Qi. After you have devoured and refined the consciousness of this world's Heavenly Dao, you can replace it and possess supreme authority within this small world. With you watching over this place, I can rest assured."

Only then did Su Yuqing realize.

Although it was a thankless task, Su Yuqing was naturally a person of tranquil disposition with few worldly desires. Moreover, cultivating here by becoming the Heavenly Dao was probably the fastest way for her to cultivate, and it would also be of great benefit to her daughter.

"I obey Master's command." Su Yuqing took a deep breath.

"Master Tiger, I don't want to be here either! It's too dark here!" Daoist child Liuli shook her head frantically.

Li Ping clearly wouldn't indulge her.

He flicked his finger and tapped Liuli's head, saying sternly, "Light and darkness, yin and yang, are two sides of the same coin. Without darkness, the meaning of light's existence is lost. Conversely, it is the same. As a Glazed Intelligence Fruit, cultivation is easy for you. But this is also your fatal flaw..."

Liuli seemed to understand but not understand, listening with wide eyes. Her intuition told her that her somewhat terrifying Master was not lying.

"Your progress is fast, but compared to human cultivators, your upper limit is naturally restricted. To break through the limit, one needs to start from the principle of [Glazed] and the principle of [Wisdom]. And you can gain something from both here."

"You are the youngest among my disciples, so you won't be lacking in gifts."

Another source of light appeared in Li Ping's hand. It was not a seal like the golden cube, but a pure aggregation of energy.

Daoist child Liuli instinctively licked her lips, feeling as if her stomach had become hungry the moment she saw this ball of light.

She reached out to try and grab it, but the ball of light seemed illusory and slipped through her palm. Liuli was extremely annoyed, waving her hands constantly, but it was all in vain.

With the ultimate delicacy before her, yet unable to eat it, Liuli almost cried with grievance on the spot.

"Master Tiger..." Liuli looked up at Li Ping with pleading eyes.

Li Ping smiled, "There are two layers of restrictions attached to this Origin Force essence. Only when you achieve a breakthrough in either Wisdom or Glazed will the restrictions be lifted."

"And when you break through your limit, this energy will also help you completely stabilize your newly transformed form."

Daoist child Liuli stared intently at the Origin Force essence light sphere and nodded vigorously.

"The Heavenly Dao is impartial, treating all beings as straw dogs. You who control this realm should follow the principle of nature. You should stand above all else. As for the myriad mortal lives, unless absolutely necessary, it is best not to intervene personally."

Li Ping's voice lingered for a long time, and his figure had already shattered and disappeared from this realm.

Su Yuqing recalled the Saint Emperor's usual behavior in front of the citizens of Great Qi and couldn't help but ponder.

"You Clan people?" Su Yuqing examined the information Li Ping had transmitted into her mind.

As for Daoist child Liuli, she kept looking around, eager to find the path to breaking through her limits that Master had mentioned.

...

Xuanhuang Realm.

After a period of cultivation, Wang Xuanba had successfully cultivated a sufficient number of the Dao Yi Worms that the Saint Emperor had ordered.

"The Heavenly Spiritual Woods all have their own effects. My little worms have another marvelous use: after they devour them, the spiritual trees do not die directly. Instead, they gradually transform into worm-infested spiritual woods. The original consciousness can choose freely whether to retain it or not. One can even merge the sources of other consciousnesses into the Dao Yi worm swarm, achieving a state similar to a clone," Wang Xuanba boasted with some self-satisfaction to Ou Shangtian.

"Alas, I still find the path of exotic beast transformation more interesting. This formation array is truly boring," Ou Shangtian's eyes flashed with envy.

Wang Xuanba smiled, with a hint of schadenfreude. "Who told you, little brother, to be overly ambitious, wanting to learn everything you see, thus displeasing Master."

"Yes, until my understanding of formations reaches Master's requirements, I cannot be half-hearted. Alas, it seems like a distant and uncertain prospect." Ou Shangtian sighed.

"Oh, right. Master also said before that in the future, he will use me as bait to lure out a hidden expert in the Xuanhuang Realm. That person is not weak; if my formation skills are not proficient enough, I might even be in mortal danger. I wonder if that's true." Ou Shangtian said somewhat carelessly.

Wang Xuanba's expression changed upon hearing this. "Junior brother, do not speak such nonsense! Since Master said so, it must be true. You've also seen Senior Xu Ke before. The hidden experts in the Xuanhuang Realm should not be underestimated. Junior brother, you must take this seriously!"

Ou Shangtian nodded in agreement on the surface, but still felt somewhat unconvinced inwardly.

He had also seen Xu Ke. But he was just a decaying old man on the verge of death.

Although his strength was far greater than Ou Shangtian's, with the Seven-Colored Jade Void Flowing Light in his possession, if he wanted to escape, Xu Ke wouldn't be able to stop him!

"I want to see just how powerful the expert Master mentioned truly is!"

Beneath the Saint Emperor's Throne, within the Sacred Dynasty's treasure vault.

Li Ping glanced slightly towards the location of Ou Shangtian and Wang Xuanba and shook his head.

He naturally sensed Ou Shangtian's thoughts.

Youthful arrogance, coupled with possessing numerous divine artifacts, was understandable.

"However, if one does not diligently study formations and relies solely on the Seven-Colored Divine Light, escaping from Shi Ban might be quite difficult."

He chuckled inwardly, having no intention of reminding him again.

It would be good for him to suffer a setback. Shi Ban would not rashly kill him.

As long as Shi Ban appeared, Li Ping would naturally deal with him.

After collecting the Stone Tablet and dealing with Ruo Mu, Li Ping put this matter aside for now and gently stroked the orange kitten lying on his shoulder.

Compared to before, Cat Treasure had grown a size larger.

Its fur had gone from sparse to dense, becoming soft and lustrous.

What concerned the Saint Emperor even more was Cat Treasure's second transformation.

Previously, Cat Treasure could transform into a small square box, and the light emitted from the box could replicate anything it enveloped.

Its limits were still unclear, but at least it could replicate [World Artifacts] refined from the power of a world without issue, though it might consume excessive energy.

And not long ago, when Wang Xuanba brought the Dao Yi Worms that had devoured spiritual wood to report to the Saint Emperor, Li Ping felt Cat Treasure's thoughts being transmitted to him for the first time.

After Wang Xuanba left, Li Ping began to conduct experiments.

He placed a mass of approximately tens of thousands of Dao Yi Worms before Cat Treasure.

Initially, Cat Treasure seemed somewhat fearful, observing from afar. But its eyes betrayed a longing.

Taking two steps forward and one step back, Cat Treasure slowly approached the Dao Yi Worm swarm.

The Dao Yi Worms, usually highly sensitive to foreign objects, showed no reaction to Cat Treasure's approach.

Finally reaching the worm swarm, a faint blue light emanated from Cat Treasure, and before Li Ping's watchful eyes, it transformed into a blue sphere of light.

It enveloped the Dao Yi Worms.

The worm swarm within the blue sphere seemed to be instantly frozen, entering a state of stasis.

And on the surface of the sphere, various views of the Dao Yi Worm's body structure flashed intermittently.

Li Ping's expression grew serious.

The sphere did not last long, as this form seemed to consume an extreme amount of energy.

Before long, Cat Treasure reverted to its small kitten form and returned to Li Ping's side.

It lay lazily on Li Ping's shoulder.

The previously immobile Dao Yi Worms then resumed their movement.

However, they remained completely unaware of what had happened to them throughout the entire process.

"It's not that the Dao Yi Worms have too low intelligence. Even if they were transformed into cultivators of the Xuanhuang Realm, the result would likely be the same."

"This blue light from Cat Treasure..."

It was a mysterious power Li Ping had never seen before.

With a thought, he patted Cat Treasure.

The little orange cat, though somewhat unwilling, seemed to muster its spirits thanks to Li Ping's prolonged feeding of golden Origin Force essence.

The blue light enveloped its body and then instantly shattered.

A moment later, Cat Treasure transformed into a swarm of Dao Yi Worms!

Identical to the swarm earlier, encased in the blue sphere not far away!

The entire transformation process occurred right before Li Ping's eyes, yet he couldn't find any difference between the two.

"It's not a transformation technique, but a complete change of life form, which is why no difference can be detected."

Even though he considered himself the Destined Saint Emperor, the Xuanhuang Spirit, Li Ping couldn't help but sigh with genuine admiration at this seemingly miraculous technique.

"Furthermore, the transformation is not limited to just replicating the original body. It can also evolve completely based on the characteristics of the replicated subject."

Li Ping seemed to have a realization, and another point of golden light appeared at his fingertip.

Cat Treasure understood Li Ping's intention. The Dao Yi Worm swarm suddenly expanded, and visibly, from tens of thousands, it instantly swelled to hundreds of thousands, increasing its numbers tenfold.

The Dao Yi Worm swarm, transformed from Cat Treasure, returned to Li Ping's side as if seeking praise.

After receiving permission, the blue light shattered, and it reverted back to its orange cat form.

Happily, it began to gobble down the Origin Force essence.

"This is also a form of replication. However, it replicates living beings, and it can even evolve based on Cat Treasure's own transformations."

"Such a technique..."

Li Ping fell silent.

In his memory, perhaps only treasures from the Immortal Realm could achieve this.

But he couldn't sense any trace of Immortal Spiritual Energy from Cat Treasure.

"Beyond the high wall..."

A fact that had to be admitted was already clear.

"I just don't know what level of treasure this Cat Treasure is, outside the high wall."

Li Ping's resolve was firm; he did not waver despite the potential gap between what was inside and outside the high wall.

"Item replication, creature simulation... I wonder if Cat Treasure has other functions?"

Trying to find answers from the little orange cat, Li Ping discovered that Cat Treasure itself knew little about its own abilities.

It would only automatically learn when conditions were met.

"And not all creatures are willing for Cat Treasure to replicate or simulate them."

"I tried with some ordinary exotic beasts, but it showed no reaction. Only strange existences like the Dao Yi Worms would arouse its interest."

Li Ping gently stroked the treasure from beyond the high wall, and various uses flashed through his mind.

"This Cat Treasure, although it has no offensive capabilities, its value is far greater than purely destructive treasures."

As if sensing Li Ping's thoughts, the little orange cat let out a proud meow.

Seven days later, Wang Xuanba arrived in the Xuanhuang Realm carrying a wooden box.

With his feet on the ground, Wang Xuanba closed his eyes and sensed the flowing Earth Vein power deep beneath the surface.

"Here's a little appetizer for you. The main course is yet to come."

A smile appeared on Wang Xuanba's face, and he transformed into a black shadow, drilling into the ground.

In an instant, he reached the extreme depths underground.

The flowing Earth Vein power formed a defense, preventing him from getting closer.

He even vaguely sensed a wisp of consciousness scanning him.

Wang Xuanba sneered inwardly and broke the wooden box.

A mass of shadow instantly flew towards the yellow Earth Vein.

The protective layer was like paper, easily gnawed through.

Chapter 1244: Life and Death Undecided

"Heaven and Earth have Ruo Mu, consuming life and longevity day and night."

"Life and death have no cycle, only eternal life remains..."

Li Ping was not startled by the appearance of Ruo Mu, but instead, chanted unhurriedly. At the same time, he turned around and looked directly at this ancient tree between heaven and earth.

Ruo Mu sized up the Faceless Saint Emperor, a hint of confusion flashing in his aged eyes.

However, Li Ping's next words caused the lines on Ruo Mu's face to deepen into a frown.

"Your creation was bestowed by heaven and earth. Without the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao's blessing, the so-called [Eternal Hengyuan] would merely be an ordinary large tree."

"When the Heavenly Dao faced crisis, you did not rise up to resist, but merely survived."

"You betrayed the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao first, not the Heaven and Earth abandoning you," Li Ping said sarcastically, without any sympathy.

Ruo Mu's expression froze as if solidified.

Meanwhile, the branches and leaves of the ancient tree not far away trembled slightly. The countless cultivator fruits hanging on it also swayed continuously.

"Fight back? When the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao was suppressed, what could I have done? On the contrary, you, a cultivator, are devouring the Heavenly Dao to cultivate. Do you not find it laughable to say such things?" Ruo Mu gazed at Li Ping for a long time, unable to discern his true nature.

However, all cultivators in the world are roughly the same.

Coupled with the faint aura of the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao on Li Ping, Ruo Mu made a judgment and retorted.

However, it was only verbal sparring; he did not attack directly.

It was not that Ruo Mu had suddenly changed his temper and become kinder, but rather...

He simply couldn't win.

Although it was not evident, Ruo Mu's spiritual intuition was frantically signaling a warning. As the oldest spiritual entity in heaven and earth, Ruo Mu's intuition had reached a mysterious level, almost able to glimpse possible future scenes.

Ruo Mu was absolutely certain that if he fought this uninvited guest, he would be the one to perish.

Furthermore, the pressure emanating from the other party, which was even stronger than that of the Longevity Realm cultivators he had encountered before, further confirmed his judgment.

That's right. Although Ruo Mu was now severely ill and decrepit, he was still alive.

Naturally, he would not seek death.

"What right do I have to take back my own things?" Li Ping no longer suppressed himself and released the aura of the devoured Xuanhuang malevolent thought.

"What is this?!" Ruo Mu's heart was immediately shaken.

He could naturally distinguish the difference between scattered laws being devoured and absorbed by a cultivator and the complete Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao.

But, how was this possible?

"Xuanhuang Great Heavenly Venerate?" Ruo Mu's mind flashed with this thought, but he quickly dismissed it.

Even though his power had been largely lost, his deep connection with the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao remained. If a new Great Heavenly Venerate had succeeded, he could not have been unaware.

"Is it perhaps the Heavenly Dao itself?" Ruo Mu thought, unable to believe it.

This conjecture was difficult to believe, but it was the most fitting explanation for the current situation.

Although he could not be certain, Ruo Mu's attitude immediately changed.

"What is your purpose in coming here?"

Li Ping naturally stated his intention to reclaim the power of Ruo Mu.

Without waiting for Ruo Mu's reaction, Li Ping changed the subject: "When the Heavenly Dao was in peril, the ancient beings of Xuanhuang turned a blind eye and ignored it. Therefore, the Heavenly Dao instinctively reclaims your power."

"Although there was external aid to help the Heavenly Dao recover, the process of reclaiming it has not stopped. Everything happens for a reason, and you have no need to resent."

"I am here to bring it to a complete end."

Li Ping's gaze once again fell upon the towering, decaying ancient tree.

And the countless cultivator fruits hanging on it.

"However, it now appears that you have not done nothing. Even if it was just a drop in the bucket, you did contribute a little."

A majestic golden power erupted from Li Ping.

A giant golden palm instantly appeared near Ruo Mu's main body, gently plucking one of the cultivator fruits from the treetop.

With a gentle squeeze, the cultivator's body instantly turned to ash, leaving behind only a broken golden core suspended in the air.

Li Ping's action of plucking his own fruit did not cause the slightest fluctuation in Ruo Mu's emotions.

However, a hint of schadenfreude instinctively flashed in his eyes.

"Do you think the cultivators of the Xuanhuang Realm today are wrong?"

The space of the Man-Who-Rejects-Life was silent for a moment, then Li Ping suddenly asked.

"More than wrong? I wish I could turn all these ungrateful wretches into fruits and torment them eternally." Ruo Mu finally replied through gritted teeth.

"While cultivators in the world may have their faults, the root of their conflict with heaven and earth is the fundamental issue," Li Ping said calmly.

"Why do cultivators devour heaven and earth? It's simply because that's the only path they can take. The root of everything stems from that Law Transmission Heavenly Venerate."

Li Ping's voice echoed continuously, and Ruo Mu could only fall silent.

Everyone understood this principle.

But what could be done?

The Law Transmission was too powerful after violating the laws of heaven and earth; even the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao itself could not resist, let alone the beings within the Xuanhuang Realm.

"I wish to rectify the wrongs and slay the Law Transmitter, returning the Dao to Heaven."

"Are you willing to help me?"

Li Ping's cold voice reached Ruo Mu's ears.

If anyone else had said this to Ruo Mu, Ruo Mu would have laughed and turned them into fruit, hanging them at the very top of the tree canopy for eternal mockery.

However, the one making such bold claims now was the potential incarnation of the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao...

This left Ruo Mu momentarily unsure how to respond.

Ruo Mu knew that if he chose to refuse, a great battle would be inevitable between them.

Putting aside who was stronger or weaker, this was his main body's location. If a great battle were to erupt here,

Even if he could win, he would be severely wounded again, not far from total collapse.

But to be subdued with just a few words, Ruo Mu felt a hundred times more unwilling.

"Your decline, besides your own injuries, is also related to the severance of the Heavenly Dao."

"If you defect to me..."

Li Ping took a step forward, his figure shattering. Empowered by the golden light surrounding him, his three-zhang-three-inch body instantly expanded tens of thousands of times, almost becoming as large as Ruo Mu's main body.

He placed one hand on Ruo Mu's trunk.

"Boom!"

In Ruo Mu's space, the dim yellow sky suddenly emitted a vortex.

The reflection of the Xuanhuang Realm appeared in the vortex.

Green energy was drawn out from the vortex and slowly floated towards the aged Ruo Mu.

"This..."

Ruo Mu excitedly straightened his originally hunched back, his eyes filled with surprise and disbelief.

He felt that the Heavenly Dao's favor, which had been slowly flowing away for thousands of years, had finally returned to him!

Li Ping was right; all his creation came from the Xuanhuang Heavenly Favor.

Without the nourishment of the Heavenly Dao, he was like a rootless tree, a source-less river, slowly withering and entering a state of chronic death.

But at this moment, the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao, uncharacteristically, poured a little power into him!

Even though it was not the power of life and death he was familiar with, it still filled him with excitement and renewed vitality.

The yellow Ruo Mu main body trembled greatly from top to bottom, its branches and leaves.

Many cultivator fruits fell from above, shattering into pieces. Only broken golden cores, emitting different glows, lay quietly on the ground.

Wisps of green emerged from Ruo Mu's body.

Tender green new sprouts indeed grew on the branches, and the entire ancient tree's aura changed.

Just as Ruo Mu was intoxicatingly enjoying the vibrant life he had not felt for a long time...

Li Ping, who had transformed into a golden giant, suddenly removed his hand from the tree trunk.

The vortex above Ruo Mu disappeared abruptly.

The green energy descending from the sky also dispersed like bubbles into specks of green light, scattering everywhere, except for Ruo Mu himself.

"No!"

Amidst Ruo Mu's wail, the newly born sprouts instantly withered and died.

They fell slowly from the top of the tree.

"I want more!"

"Give it to me quickly!"

Ruo Mu's old man incarnation erupted with astonishing ferocity.

He glared fiercely at Li Ping.

Then, upon seeing the other party's featureless face and his extremely cold aura, Ruo Mu immediately calmed down.

His fierce expression froze on his face, and he dared not make any further moves.

Li Ping simply stared at him quietly.

The scene became eerily silent.

It wasn't until a withered yellow leaf floated down and landed above Li Ping that he gently reached out and took it.

Only then did Li Ping break the silence, continuing his unfinished words: "As you saw and experienced..."

"If you turn back now and return to my side, it may not be impossible to return to your peak state in ancient times."

Ruo Mu's expression clearly wavered.

Struggling for survival, suffering torment for thousands of years, and now finally tasting a moment of youth, how could he possibly give it up?

"I know you were heavily injured in ancient times, and a large portion of your core power was stolen by cultivators."

"But the current Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao is no longer what it used to be."

"If you can regain your complete authority, you will undoubtedly be even stronger than you were back then."

Li Ping continued to speak.

"I will give you one month to consider."

"I will come again then."

Li Ping did not force Ruo Mu too much and made a decision instantly.

Only this sentence was left behind, and then Li Ping's figure, fluttering, disappeared without a trace.

This was Ruo Mu's domain, yet Ruo Mu could not even sense how the other party had left.

Without the outsider, this place returned to the state of deathly silence it had been in for thousands of years.

Ruo Mu narrowed his eyes, ceaselessly savoring the taste of life he had just experienced.

Comparing it to his current situation, a sense of loss involuntarily welled up in his heart.

...

Sacred Dynasty of Great Qi.

Within the Saint Emperor's Throne.

Upon his return, Li Ping immediately issued a sacred decree.

He would allocate more You Clan members, focusing on the functions of the Dark Sea, to appease the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao.

"In its current state, forcibly infusing power from the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao to Ruo Mu still has some influence."

"Even if it's just a tiny bit..."

"Besides the gap caused by devouring the Xuanhuang malevolent thought, it also has something to do with Ruo Mu's identity."

"After all, in the eyes of the Heavenly Dao, cultivators like them are no different from traitors."

Li Ping pondered slowly.

This operation was not entirely without reward.

Ruo Mu, having tasted the sweetness, would certainly not refuse Li Ping's request.

However, he needed some time to make a decision.

As for why he didn't choose to act forcefully, like he did with the Xuanhuang malevolent thought, and devour it directly...

Li Ping had his own considerations.

"Unlike the Xuanhuang malevolent thought, which was separated and sealed for a long time, Ruo Mu, although dilapidated, is an ancient being that has existed since the beginning of Xuanhuang."

"The Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao created it, and it has become an integral part of the Xuanhuang Realm. If it were naturally abandoned by the Heavenly Dao and withered away, perhaps it could avoid turmoil."

"But if I rashly devour it, firstly, it will alert other Longevity Realm experts in this realm."

"Secondly, perhaps the anomalies in the Xuanhuang Realm will be detected by the Law Transmission Heavenly Venerate, who is far away in the Star Sea."

Li Ping did not care about the Five Elders Council's Heavenly Venerates.

However, he had to consider the existence of the Law Transmission and the Heavenly Physician.

"It is not yet time for a true confrontation with them."

"We can wait a little longer."

Li Ping's patience was ample.

He believed that within a month, Ruo Mu would actively contact him.

In the meantime, he needed to try his best to mend some of the strained relationship with the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao.

Li Ping's eyes flickered again, recalling beings that Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao abhorred.

...

Jiu Mountain Prefecture.

At the border between the Myriad Immortals Alliance and the Five Elders Council.

Sun Erlang easily passed through the defenses of the Myriad Immortals Alliance's border line and entered the territory of the Five Elders Council.

"Master's bestowed treasure is truly wondrous. The formations of the Myriad Immortals Alliance are almost instantly breakable."

Sun Erlang carefully examined the surrounding environment.

"It seems no different from the Myriad Immortals Alliance."

"However, Master said that this place is covered by the Heavenly Venerate's laws, so it's better to keep a low profile."

An image of a simplified map appeared in his mind. Sun Erlang vaguely identified the direction and then concealed his form, speeding away.

Following the instructions of the Faceless Saint Emperor, he headed directly towards the Land of Truth.

"I wonder how one can meet this [True Heavenly Venerate]?"

Sun Erlang pondered as he flew.

With the formations and secret arts transmitted by Li Ping concealing his aura, no one discovered him along the way.

As he was getting very close to the Land of Truth, the anomalies nearby attracted Sun Erlang's attention and forced him to slow down.

A colossal flying boat, with a somewhat unreal feeling, suddenly appeared in the sky.

From the flying boat, more than ten cultivators encased in armor flew out in unison.

They wielded strange magical artifacts and were shouting loudly.

"This is it, quickly! We can't let other teams get there first!"

They flew over a patch of forest on the ground, and the magical artifacts in their hands simultaneously emitted beams of light of different colors.

The beams of light locked onto a snow-white great ape that suddenly appeared in the forest, letting out a roar that shook the heavens.

Sun Erlang's pupils contracted.

Because this demonic beast had hidden itself so cleverly that he hadn't sensed even the slightest trace of its aura before.

And even now, while the great ape was locked in fierce combat with the cultivators,

Sun Erlang still couldn't sense any life aura from the demonic beast.

Chapter 1245: Subduing Ruomu with Reason

"Heaven and Earth have the Ruo Mu, consuming life and aging day by day."

"Life and death have no cycle, only eternal life remains..."

Li Ping did not flinch from the sudden appearance of Ruo Mu. Instead, he calmly chanted and turned around, facing the oldest tree in the Xuanhuang Realm.

Ruo Mu sized up the Faceless Saint Emperor, a flicker of doubt in its ancient eyes.

However, Li Ping's next words caused the lines on Ruo Mu's face to furrow deeply.

"Your creation was bestowed by Heaven and Earth. Without the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao's favor, the so-called [Guangheng Hengyuan] would merely be an ordinary great tree."

"When the Heavenly Dao was in crisis, you did not rise to resist, but chose to survive in secret..."

"You betrayed the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao first, not the other way around," Li Ping rebuked without a trace of sympathy.

Ruo Mu's expression froze as if solidified.

The main body of the ancient tree in the distance, however, slightly rustled its branches and leaves. The countless cultivator fruits hanging on it also swayed accordingly.

"Rise to resist? The Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao was suppressed, what could I have done? On the contrary, you, a cultivator, devoured the Heavenly Dao to cultivate. Do you not find it laughable to say such things?" Ruo Mu stared at Li Ping for a long time, unable to discern his true nature.

However, all cultivators in the world were more or less the same.

Coupled with the faint aura of the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao on Li Ping, Ruo Mu made a judgment and retorted.

However, it was merely verbal sparring, not a direct attack.

It wasn't that Ruo Mu had suddenly changed his temperament or become kinder, but rather...

He simply couldn't win.

Although it wasn't outwardly apparent, Ruo Mu's spiritual sense was frantically warning him. As the oldest spiritual being in heaven and earth, Ruo Mu's intuition had reached a profound level, almost able to glimpse future possible events.

Ruo Mu was absolutely certain that if he were to fight this uninvited guest, he himself would be the one to perish.

Moreover, the pressure emanating from the other party, which was even stronger than that of the Longevity Realm cultivators he had encountered before, made Ruo Mu even more certain of his judgment.

That's right. Although Ruo Mu was now severely ailing and broken, he was still alive.

Naturally, he wouldn't court death.

"What crime is it for me to reclaim what is rightfully mine?" Li Ping no longer suppressed his aura and released the aura of the devoured Xuanhuang malevolent thought.

"This is?!" Ruo Mu's heart trembled immediately.

He could naturally distinguish the difference between fragmented laws devoured and absorbed by cultivators and the complete Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao.

But, how was this possible?

"Great Heavenly Venerate of Xuanhuang?" Ruo Mu's mind suddenly flashed with this thought, but he quickly dismissed it.

Even though his power had been greatly diminished, his deep connection with the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao still remained. If a new Great Heavenly Venerate had succeeded, he could not have been unaware of it.

"Reclaiming what is rightfully mine, could it be the Heavenly Dao itself?" Ruo Mu thought, finding it hard to believe.
