This guess was indeed incredible, but it was the most realistic explanation.

Although not yet certain, it did not prevent Ruo Mu's attitude from changing drastically.

"Why have you come to this place?"

Li Ping, as a matter of course, stated his intention to reclaim Ruo Mu's power.

Without waiting for Ruo Mu's reaction, Li Ping changed the subject: "When the Heavenly Dao faced crisis, the ancient beings of Xuanhuang turned a blind eye and stood idly by. Therefore, the Heavenly Dao's instinct is to reclaim your power."

"Although there was external help to revive the Heavenly Dao, the process of reclamation has not stopped. What is destined will happen. You need not resent."

"I am here to bring it to a complete end."

Li Ping's gaze once again fell upon the towering, decaying ancient tree.

And the countless Golden Core cultivators suspended upon it.

"However, it seems you haven't done nothing. Even if it was merely a drop in the bucket, you did contribute some effort."

A magnificent golden power erupted from Li Ping.

A golden giant hand instantly appeared near Ruo Mu's main body, gently plucking one of the cultivator fruits from the treetop.

With a gentle squeeze, the cultivator's body instantly turned to dust, leaving behind only a fractured Golden Core suspended in the air.

Li Ping's action of plucking his own fruit did not cause any fluctuation in Ruo Mu's emotions.

However, a flicker of relief flashed in his eyes.

"Do you think the cultivators of the Xuanhuang Realm today are wrong?"

The space of the Tortoise Longevity Tree fell silent for a moment, and then Li Ping suddenly asked.

"More than wrong? I wish I could turn all these ungrateful wretches into fruits and torment them eternally." Ruo Mu finally responded through gritted teeth.

"Cultivators in this world, while having their flaws, the root of the conflict between them and the world is the fundamental issue." Li Ping stated calmly.

"Why do cultivators devour Heaven and Earth? It's solely because it's the only path they can take. The root of everything lies with that Law Transmission Heavenly Venerate."

Li Ping's voice echoed ceaselessly, and Ruo Mu could only fall silent.

Everyone knew this truth.

But what could be done?

The Law Transmission Heavenly Venerate, who defied the principles of Heaven and Earth, was too powerful, so much so that even the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao itself could not resist. Let alone the beings within the Xuanhuang Realm.

"I intend to rectify the chaos and slay the Law Transmitter, returning the Dao to Heaven."

"Do you wish to assist me?"

Li Ping's cold voice reached Ruo Mu's ears.

If anyone else had said this to Ruo Mu, Ruo Mu would have laughed and turned them into a fruit, hanging it at the very top of the tree for eternal mockery.

However, the one who made such a boast now was the nascent Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao's incarnation...

This left Ruo Mu uncertain how to respond.

Ruo Mu knew that if he chose to refuse, a great battle would inevitably ensue between them.

Let alone who was stronger or weaker, this was his main body's location. If a battle were to occur here,

Even if he won, he would undoubtedly be severely injured, not far from complete ruin.

But to be subdued with a single word, Ruo Mu felt a hundred kinds of unwillingness in his heart.

"Your decay, besides your inherent injuries, is also related to the disruption of the Heavenly Dao."

"If you pledge allegiance to me..."

Li Ping took a step forward, his figure shattering. Empowered by the golden light surrounding him, his three-zhang-three-cun body instantly expanded tens of thousands of times, almost becoming as large as Ruo Mu's main body.

He placed one hand on Ruo Mu's trunk.

"Boom!"

In the Ruo Mu space, the dusky, deathly silent sky suddenly produced a vortex.

The reflection of the Xuanhuang Realm appeared in the vortex.

Green energy was drawn out from the vortex and slowly floated towards the aged Ruo Mu.

"This..."

Ruo Mu excitedly straightened his originally hunched back, his eyes filled with surprise and disbelief.

He felt that the Heavenly Dao's favor, which had been slowly draining for thousands of years, had finally returned to him!

Li Ping was right; his creation was all from the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao's favor.

Without the Heavenly Dao's nourishment, he was like a rootless tree, a waterless source, slowly withering and entering a state of slow death.

But at this moment, the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao amazingly poured a small amount of power into him again.

Although it was not the power of life and death he was familiar with, it still excited him and revitalized him.

The decaying Ruo Mu main body trembled violently from top to bottom of its branches and leaves.

Quite a few cultivator fruits fell from above, shattering into pieces. Only fractured Golden Cores, emitting different lights, lay quietly on the ground.

Traces of green appeared on Ruo Mu's body.

Tender green new shoots actually grew on the branches, and the entire ancient tree's aura changed.

Just as Ruo Mu was blissfully enjoying the vigorous vitality he hadn't felt for so long...

Li Ping, who had transformed into a golden giant, suddenly removed his hand from the tree trunk.

The vortex above Ruo Mu suddenly disappeared.

The descending green energy also turned into scattered green light like bubbles and dispersed everywhere in the wind, but it did not fall on Ruo Mu.

"No!"

Amidst Ruo Mu's wails, the newly born tender shoots instantly withered and fell.

From the top of the tree, they slowly drifted down.

"I want more!"

"Give it to me quickly!"

Ruo Mu's aged avatar erupted with monstrous malevolence.

He glared fiercely at Li Ping.

Then, upon seeing the other party's featureless face and extremely cold aura, Ruo Mu immediately calmed down.

His fierce expression froze on his face, daring not to make any further moves.

Li Ping merely stared coldly at him.

The scene became eerily silent for a moment.

Until a withered yellow leaf happened to fall above Li Ping, and he gently reached out to take it.

Only then did Li Ping break the silence.

He continued the words he had not finished saying: "As you saw and personally experienced..."

"If you mend your ways and stand on my side again, perhaps you can return to your peak state from ancient times."

Ruo Mu's expression clearly wavered.

Having struggled until death and suffered for thousands of years, only to savor a moment of youth, how could he give it up now?

"I know you were severely injured in ancient times, and a large part of your core strength was stolen by cultivators."

"But the current Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao is not what it used to be."

"If you can regain your full authority, you will definitely be stronger than before."

Li Ping continued.

"I will give you one month to consider."

"I will return then."

Li Ping did not pressure Ruo Mu excessively and instantly made his decision.

He vanished without a trace.

This was Ruo Mu's domain, yet Ruo Mu couldn't even sense how the other party had left.

Without the outside intruder, this place returned to the deathly silence it had been in for thousands of years.

Ruo Mu narrowed his eyes, constantly savoring the taste of vitality from moments ago.

Compared with his current situation, a sense of loss welled up in his heart.

...

Sacred Dynasty of Great Qi.

In the Saint Emperor's Throne.

After returning, Li Ping immediately issued a sacred decree.

He allocated more You Clan members and diverted their attention to the function of the Sea of Darkness to appease the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao.

"In its current state, forcibly supplying power to Ruo Mu from the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao still has some impact."

"Even if it's just that tiny bit..."

"Besides the gap caused by devouring the Xuanhuang malevolent thought, it also has something to do with Ruo Mu's identity."

"After all, in the eyes of the Heavenly Dao, these ancient beings of Xuanhuang are no different from traitors."

Li Ping pondered slowly.

This operation was not entirely fruitless.

Ruo Mu, having tasted the benefits, would certainly not refuse Li Ping's request.

He just needed to give him some time to make a decision.

As for why he didn't choose to forcibly act, like he did with the Xuanhuang malevolent thought, and devour it directly...

Li Ping had his own concerns.

"Unlike the Xuanhuang malevolent thought, which was severed and sealed for a long time, Ruo Mu, although dilapidated, has existed since the beginning of Xuanhuang."

"The Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao created it, and it has become an integral part of the Xuanhuang Realm. If it were to wither and die naturally after the Heavenly Dao withdrew its favor, it might avoid turmoil."

"But if I rashly devour it, firstly, it will alert other Longevity Realm experts in this realm."

"Secondly, perhaps the Xuanhuang Realm's anomaly will alert the Law Transmission Heavenly Venerate, who is far away in the Sea of Stars."

Li Ping didn't care about the five Heavenly Venerates of the Five Elders Council.

But he had to consider the existence of the Law Transmitter and the Heavenly Physician.

"It is not yet time for a true confrontation with them."

"Let's wait a bit longer."

Li Ping's patience was abundant.

He believed that within a month, Ruo Mu would proactively contact him.

Before that, he needed to try his best to reverse some of the unfavorable relationships with the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao.

Li Ping's eyes flashed with images of existences that the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao detested.

...

Nine Mountains Prefecture.

At the border between the Myriad Immortals Alliance and the Five Elders Council.

Sun Erlang easily passed through the defenses of the Myriad Immortals Alliance's border line and entered the territory of the Five Elders Council.

"The treasure bestowed by Master is truly miraculous. This Myriad Immortals Alliance's formation is almost instantly breakable."

Sun Erlang carefully examined his surroundings.

"It seems no different from the Myriad Immortals Alliance."

"But Master said that this place is covered by the Heavenly Venerate's anomalous power, so it's best to keep a low profile."

An image of a simplified map appeared in his mind; Sun Erlang vaguely recognized the direction and then vanished, heading towards the Land of Truth.

According to the Faceless Saint Emperor's instructions, he went straight to the Land of Truth.

"I wonder how one can meet the True Heavenly Venerate?"

Sun Erlang flew while pondering.

With the concealing techniques and formations transmitted by Li Ping, he was not discovered by anyone along the way.

Just as he was very close to the Land of Truth, an anomaly nearby attracted Sun Erlang's attention, causing him to slow down.

A giant flying boat, possessing a somewhat unreal quality, suddenly appeared in the sky.

From the flying boat, more than ten cultivators clad in armor flew out in unison.

They held strange magical artifacts and were shouting loudly.

"This is it, quickly! We can't let other teams get there first!"

They flew above a patch of jungle on the ground, and their magical artifacts simultaneously emitted beams of light of different colors.

Targeting the beams, a large ape, pure white all over, suddenly appeared in the jungle, letting out a sky-shattering roar.

Sun Erlang's pupils contracted.

Because this demonic beast had hidden itself so skillfully that he hadn't sensed the slightest trace of its aura before.

Moreover, even now, while the great ape was locked in intense combat with the cultivators,

Sun Erlang couldn't sense any sign of life from the demonic beast.

Chapter 1246: Fruit Tree Genesis

Sun Erlang hid and observed the battle between the Five Elders Council cultivators and the great ape, gradually feeling a sense of solemnity in his heart.

"So strong..."

This was his evaluation of the cultivators before him.

There were no spiritual energy fluctuations, and the destructive range of their attacks was confined to a certain space. Sun Erlang was unable to perceive their specific cultivation levels.

However, judging solely from their combat coordination and their calm demeanor in facing all kinds of crises, their combat proficiency was something he had never seen before.

Even considering those he had encountered in the simulated world of the Dao-Transformation Stone, these cultivators were still top-tier existences.

What surprised Sun Erlang even more were their attack and healing methods.

In addition to various magical artifacts, these cultivators occasionally used peculiar items. For example, books, wine cups, and even necklaces. These items provided buffs to their own side while inflicting various debuffs on the great ape.

Moreover, their healing speed was frighteningly fast.

The Nascent Soul cultivators tied to their cave-heavens, once their bodies were destroyed, would need at least a few breaths of time to be reborn from their cave-heavens.

But these people only needed a white light flash, and even the most severe injuries could be instantly healed. One moment they were hit by the great ape's attack and on the verge of death, the next moment, under the illumination of the white light, they were back to their lively selves.

No matter how thick-skinned the great ape was, it couldn't withstand such attrition.

What was strange was that this demonic beast acted like a stubborn fool and didn't know how to flee.

It fought until the last moment of its life, then fell down with a loud thud.

The moment the great ape died, it transformed into a dazzling golden light and surged into the bodies of the cultivators who had killed it.

The group let out a burst of cheers.

"This boss they spawned this time was really tough. Thankfully, we had enough supplies, otherwise we would have definitely failed."

"The experience points are also quite a lot. I'm about to break through to the next realm."

"It's a pity that its [Snow Ape Holy Armor] didn't drop in the bestiary, otherwise we would have really struck it rich this time."

Upon hearing this, the members of the squad all agreed and sighed with regret.

Sun Erlang, however, listened to these completely incomprehensible words, his expression becoming somewhat subtle.

"Let's go. There's nothing good left around here. Let's go back to [Paradise] first."

"This [Xuanhuang Realm] is really not a place for people. If it weren't for the mission, I really wouldn't want to come here."

The squad of cultivators entered the battleship in the sky one after another, chattering.

The battleship was enveloped in colorful light, as if it had teleported and disappeared into the sky.

Sun Erlang stared at the spot where they had disappeared, while the Dao-Transformation Stone in his mind continuously replayed the scenes it had just recorded.

"Paradise..."

"It should be the territory of that Carefree Heavenly Venerate. It seems a bit different from other places in the Xuanhuang Realm."

"They actually call the Xuanhuang Realm 'not a place for people'... Interesting."

"This matter should be reported to Master."

Sun Erlang thought this way, but he did not pursue the strange battleship.

Remembering the task assigned by Master, he continued to advance towards the Land of Truth.

Three days later, after passing through a barrier of white fog, Sun Erlang clearly felt that something had changed in the world.

"The prefecture I was just in belongs to the [Human Dao Heavenly Realm]. As for this place, it should be the [Land of Truth]."

Sun Erlang knew that within the Land of Truth, under the rule of the Heavenly Venerate's principles and laws, all cultivators were unable to utter falsehoods.

Therefore, he became even more cautious.

As a newcomer, he was completely unfamiliar with everything here. Sun Erlang decided to gather some information first before finding a way to meet the Heavenly Venerate.

Compared to the Human Dao Heavenly Realm, the Land of Truth appeared more peaceful. He rarely saw patrolling Five Elders Council cultivators.

The distinction between mortals and cultivators within the territory was not particularly obvious.

From afar, he could see them living in the same city.

"Those are indeed mortals, without cultivation. It seems the Immortal-Mortal Miasma here has been suppressed."

After careful observation, Sun Erlang reached this conclusion.

What amazed him even more was that status was not determined by cultivation level.

He could even see a young Golden Core cultivator respectfully bowing to an elderly mortal.

This made him marvel.

After observing in secret for three days, although he had a general understanding of the customs and traditions of the Land of Truth, he still couldn't find a suitable breakthrough point.

"I can't just shout on the street, 'I'm here to seek an audience with the True Heavenly Venerate,' can I?"

Just as Sun Erlang was at a loss, one day, he suddenly noticed several outsiders who were like him.

"Myriad Immortals Alliance people?" Sun Erlang narrowed his eyes.

After secretly listening for a while, Sun Erlang suddenly understood.

These four cultivators were captives from the conflict between the Five Elders Council and the Myriad Immortals Alliance, and they were currently undergoing a probationary period as assimilated individuals.

Their freedom was not restricted, and they were allowed to travel in the three territories of the Five Elders Council, excluding the Carefree Paradise.

"Brother Xu, how does this Five Elders Council compare to the Immortal Alliance?"

The four were all wearing conspicuous green robes, like prison uniforms. Among them, a middle-aged man with a long beard asked his companion.

The cultivator named Xu seemed to be recovering from a serious injury, his face pale. He coughed lightly and then replied, "Compared to the Immortal Alliance, it is indeed much more free and leisurely."

"Although we have to sign that soul contract, back in the Myriad Immortals Alliance, even without a contract, could we refuse any orders from the Immortal Alliance? If you ask me, it's essentially the same."

Another young cultivator chimed in, "And once the contract is signed here, there are no lacks in cultivation techniques or resources. As long as your innate talent is sufficient, there is endless room for development. Unlike that Myriad Immortals Alliance, humph..."

Although the long-bearded man's expression was somewhat unpleasant, he had to agree with the others' opinions.

"It seems Brother Wang Yang still has lingering hopes for the Myriad Immortals Alliance!" The cultivator named Xu saw Wang Yang's expression and couldn't help but chuckle.

"Do you remember the Myriad Immortals Alliance, and does the Myriad Immortals Alliance remember you? I've never heard of any cultivator who was captured by the Five Elders Council and successfully returned to the Immortal Alliance. Furthermore, even if you were lucky enough to escape, the Myriad Immortals Alliance would probably just arrest you as a spy."

Wang Yang's expression shifted between shades of uncertainty, but in the end, he could only sigh, unable to refute.

The four fell into an awkward silence for a moment.

"Oh, right. When that 'adult' introduced the situation of the Five Elders Council, they mentioned that cultivators in each prefecture here have the opportunity to directly meet the Heavenly Venerate. I don't know if that's true." It was the young cultivator who broke the silence and tried to ease the tension.

"Don't worry about that, Brother Zhang. I've inquired about it before, and this matter is indeed true. However, the methods to meet the Heavenly Venerates vary in different regions, and without exception, they are all extremely difficult. Only unparalleled Heavenly Prodigies can achieve it."

"For example, in the [One Heart Immortal Sect], if one achieves twenty consecutive victories in martial competitions within the sect without being defeated, they have a high probability of being summoned before the [One Heart Heavenly Venerate]."

"And here in the [Land of Truth], it is said that as long as one meditates and comprehends under the True Fruit Tree, the longer one persists, the greater the chance of receiving guidance from the Heavenly Venerate." The cultivator named Xu explained eloquently.

"I've also tried the test of the True Fruit Tree..." The cultivator named Xu paused deliberately.

Only when the others focused their attention on him did he continue, "Difficult! Difficult! Difficult!"

"You all know that there are no lies in the Land of Truth. And the test of the True Fruit Tree is to weave lies as much as possible!"

The cultivator named Xu's expression became somewhat strange. "Sitting under the fruit, it's as if one becomes an omnipotent creator deity. You need to create something from nothing, fabricating another illusory world. The more detailed and realistic the world, the longer you can persist under the fruit's scrutiny."

"Wait..." Wang Yang interrupted the cultivator named Xu.

"Does this creation of a world have any restrictions? Otherwise, if we use the unique customs of the small worlds within the Xuanhuang Realm, wouldn't it be very easy?"

The cultivator named Xu shook his head. "At the very least, small worlds that truly exist within the Xuanhuang Realm cannot be displayed in the fruit's illusion. It's like..."

He pondered for a moment and said slowly, "It's like [Law cannot be cultivated together]. Imitating a world based on a template will vanish into thin air the moment it takes shape. Only entirely fabricated ones can exist stably and withstand the fruit's test. Describing it in words is indeed somewhat mystical. However, you will know once you experience it yourselves."

"Even if you ultimately cannot meet the True Heavenly Venerate, meditating under the True Fruit Tree is also a great opportunity for us cultivators. Creating a world involves myriad Great Daos, which is truly difficult for cultivators to achieve solely through their own power. During the test, you will mostly be borrowing the power of the fruit tree, as if the Heavenly Venerate is lending you a brush to paint..." The cultivator named Xu's expression became distant, as if savoring the magical experience.

"What is the purpose of the Heavenly Venerate doing this?" Wang Yang frowned slightly.

The cultivator named Xu chuckled, "Purpose? Why bother thinking about that? I only know that completing the test will not only result in no losses but also potentially lead to enlightenment and breakthroughs. Such a good thing, in the Myriad Immortals Alliance, only a select few can enjoy it. But here in the Five Elders Council, everyone has a chance to try."

"The True Fruit Tree sprouts from illusions and blossoms in every city. As long as anyone is interested, they can sit under the tree and meditate."

"It seems that the appearance of the fruit this time is not far off. You can all experience it for yourselves. If it weren't for the fact that each person has only one chance in their lifetime, I would definitely try the opportunity of creation again." The cultivator named Xu said with some regret.

The other three had different expressions.

Meanwhile, Sun Erlang, eavesdropping from afar, narrowed his eyes.

"What a coincidence? Just as I was feeling sleepy, someone sent a pillow? Could it be that I've been discovered, is this some kind of conspiracy?"

This thought first flashed through Sun Erlang's mind.

"No, it's probably because Master knew in advance that there are methods to directly meet each Heavenly Venerate in various regions of the Five Elders Council, which is why he sent me on this errand. Otherwise, under normal circumstances, what opportunity would an outsider cultivator have to meet the supreme ruler of the Longevity Realm?" Sun Erlang pondered for a moment and suddenly understood.

"True Fruit?"

Sun Erlang's heart stirred.

He had the Dao-Transformation Stone in his mind, and even the experience of living another life in the simulated world. Participating in this so-called creation under the fruit tree should give him some advantage.

"Let's try it first. If it doesn't work, I'll think of other methods."

With a plan formed in his heart, Sun Erlang patiently waited.

Another twenty-odd days passed. On this day, the peaceful city suddenly became somewhat chaotic.

On the ground, a shadow spread rapidly from the center of the city.

It covered the entire city range.

Then, a lush green tree sprang up from the shadows.

It appeared both real and illusory.

On the treetop, there were still many lush green fruits hanging, captivating the eye at a single glance.

"The True Fruit Tree has appeared, lasting for seven days and seven nights. All living beings within the territory can achieve enlightenment under the tree."

Ding!

A clear chime resounded, spreading towards the distance.

The clear sound came from the sky, appearing in everyone's ears.

"Thank you, Heavenly Venerate, for your benevolence!"

Within the Land of Truth, countless living beings bowed their heads in gratitude.

After three rounds of this ceremony, those who were interested began to sit under the True Fruit Tree and meditate.

The city instantly became very quiet, as if afraid of disturbing the cultivators who were undergoing the test.

The group of assimilated cultivators from the Myriad Immortals Alliance that Sun Erlang had met earlier also slowly walked towards the True Fruit Tree.

Sun Erlang also hurried to follow.

Along the way, he did not encounter anyone checking their passes.

The Heavenly Venerate's words that all living beings could try were indeed not empty boasts.

Sun Erlang even saw not only humans but also some flying insects and beasts occupying a space under the shade of the tree.

This peculiar sight made Sun Erlang sigh with emotion.

"It is said that the sages of antiquity taught without discrimination, not only humans but all beings in the world could receive their teachings. This True Heavenly Venerate has a bit of that spirit."

Sun Erlang also sat down on the ground, just like everyone else.

He closed his eyes.

In an instant, Sun Erlang felt the surrounding world disappear.

The soft rustling sounds that were present in the city were now completely gone.

Although his eyes were closed, Sun Erlang felt as if he had opened his eyes.

Before him was a vast expanse of white emptiness.

"Create a world..."

Countless rule information appeared in Sun Erlang's mind.

"First, the general situation of the world."

Sun Erlang then set it up according to the simulated world he had experienced with the Dao-Transformation Stone earlier.

The blank world thus gained color.

However, unexpectedly, as the world was about to take shape, it collapsed like a sand sculpture.

It returned to blankness.

"Even a world adapted from the Xuanhuang Realm doesn't work?"

"A completely fabricated world?"

Sun Erlang couldn't help but frown.

However, he suddenly had an idea, recalling a world that Master used as an example when teaching him.

Instantly, he had an idea.

"Immortals are not evident, only materials endure."

Chapter 1247: Insistence on Exploring the Star Sea

"The world's supernatural powers have all disappeared, and a lifespan of a hundred years is the limit for ordinary people."

"However, people's eternal pursuit of the Dao remains unchanged."

"Studying, analyzing, and utilizing laws, even mortals can unleash astonishing power."

...

Within the blank world before Sun Erlang's eyes, a sphere suddenly appeared.

The sphere rotated, and countless black dots representing humans moved at an extremely fast speed.

Initially, the buildings on the ground were only a little over ten feet tall, but as time rapidly passed, more and more high-rise buildings sprung up.

Soon after, even aircraft appeared in the clouds.

Sun Erlang wove the world he envisioned in his mind while recalling his Master's teachings at that time.

"The predicament of the Xuanhuang Realm is essentially the same as these worlds without supernatural powers. Ancient texts often speak of the immortality of the Immortal Dao. Perhaps this saying is true."

"The so-called [Immortal] refers to those who exhaust the principles of the Dao and apply them to the utmost. They stand at the pinnacle of all beings, identical to the Dao, looking down upon the masses, immortal and indestructible."

"But what if the [Dao] itself changes?"

"The Dao is still the Dao. However, those who cannot adapt to the changed Dao will inevitably head towards destruction."

"If one cannot harmonize with the Dao, immortals are not worthy of being called immortals. They will perish."

"From the common people, new [Users of the Dao] will always emerge. The power they wield will only grow stronger."

"Becoming the new [Immortal]."

...

At that time, the Faceless Saint Emperor spoke these profound words, which not only Sun Erlang but also the other direct disciples under the Saint Emperor's throne could not comprehend.

However, at this moment, by leveraging the power of the True Fruit, he had the fortune to experience the taste of creation.

Sun Erlang looked at the world he had created before him, and a realization suddenly struck him.

In that spherical world, after countless years of natural evolution, races that conformed to the Dao of his created world would eventually emerge.

They would be able to discover the ultimate secrets of the world that other beings could not perceive, and thus become the so-called [Dao Users] of this world.

Boom!

Sun Erlang's vision rapidly shifted and descended onto the sphere he had created.

In an ordinary building, a young scholar frowned and pondered under the light.

On the blackboard before him were filled with complex formulas and diagrams.

"Wrong, wrong, wrong..."

"Where exactly did the calculation go wrong? Why does my calculated result deviate so much from the actual trajectory?"

"It's as if there's a force restraining us, preventing us from leaving this planet."

The scholar painfully tugged at his hair and then suddenly looked up at the window outside.

In the dark night, it seemed as if his eyes met Sun Erlang's.

...

Sun Erlang's vision blurred, and the scene instantly shattered.

When he came to his senses, he was surprised to find that spaceships were already beginning to attempt to break through the "boundary of the world" on the sphere.

But outside the world, which Sun Erlang had not yet created, there was still nothingness.

Naturally, they would not succeed.

Sun Erlang's thoughts raced, and he began to open up new maps.

The white space slowly turned dark. In the starry sky, besides the original sphere, tens of thousands of other planets also began to appear.

The map's scope suddenly expanded more than tenfold, and Sun Erlang's Dao-Transformation Stone was already running at its limit.

To reduce the workload, Sun Erlang set most of these planets to be barren and lifeless.

And to prevent the natives of the original planet from expanding too quickly, he set the distances between each planet very far apart.

So far that without Longevity power, it would take almost a lifetime for a person to travel between planets.

...

With great effort, Sun Erlang managed to barely save the world that was on the verge of collapse.

However, soon, before he could fully refine and expand the star map, the world became precarious again.

After investigation, Sun Erlang realized that the natives had actually begun to doubt the authenticity of their world.

It was not only because they could not fly out of the world, but also because they had observed countless planets in the starry sky that they had not observed before.

These planets seemed to have appeared out of nowhere, shattering their understanding.

"You can't set rules crudely, but rather must embed the phenomena of all things in the fundamental principles of the world."

This sentence suddenly flashed through Sun Erlang's mind.

Soon, he made corresponding adjustments.

Next, during another attempt by the natives, a spaceship actually managed to break free from the planet's constraints and enter the starry sky.

The humans on the spaceship discovered that outside the planet, there was a blue halo.

It was precisely the existence of this halo that interfered with the planet's external observations and prevented their previous attempts to break free from the planet.

This was a discovery that could be called world-shattering!

After experiencing life-and-death crises, this spaceship finally returned to the ground and made this discovery public.

And after the scholars on the planet incorporated this star halo variable into their calculations, theory and reality finally achieved temporary consistency.

People cheered, welcoming the arrival of a new era. At the same time, the members of the first spaceship to fly into space were all regarded as heroes.

With the success of this precedent, the natives, who had been suppressed for a long time, ushered in a peak in their development speed.

Fortunately, at this time, Sun Erlang had basically completed the depiction of the desolate star map.

Moreover, due to the vastness of the created star sea, using space and time to temporarily stabilize these natives.

But Sun Erlang knew that this was only a temporary measure.

Sooner or later, they would discover the anomaly in this star sea.

"If you don't want to be discovered, you have to continue expanding this star sea."

"And the expansion speed must exceed the speed at which these little people explore."

The macroscopic perspective rose tens of thousands of times.

Endless star clouds and galaxies were born outside the darkness.

The Dao-Transformation Stone was already operating at its limits.

"Everything is interconnected in the vastness of the star sea. Every object has a connection with others."

"It's not just a matter of adding things later; the impact of their appearance on the original planet must also be considered."

"..."

After Sun Erlang pondered, he felt that the Dao-Transformation Stone was on the verge of collapse. So, gritting his teeth, he simply used the span of space to minimize these impacts.

"By the time these little people notice something is wrong, it should be a long time later."

The natives' progress continued to accelerate.

They studied the star halos and invented reverse-thrust ships that could utilize the star halos' binding force.

Like a slingshot, they were rapidly ejected outward.

Although they could not turn back, it greatly accelerated the natives' exploration speed of the star sea.

"This is too fast?"

Sun Erlang watched dumbfounded as the first reverse-thrust ship, accelerating by utilizing the star halos of passing planets.

Sailed towards the edge of the star sea.

"No..."

Sun Erlang pondered for a moment and guided a meteor, changing its original trajectory, causing it to smash fiercely towards that reverse-thrust ship.

Unexpectedly, it was narrowly dodged by the people on the flying boat.

Sun Erlang's vision blurred, and the scene from within the reverse-thrust ship appeared before him.

"My Lord, thank you! Otherwise, we would have truly perished this time!"

A stern-faced, long-bearded middle-aged man said, his expression not relaxing. "This meteorite came very strangely. The starry sky is so vast, yet it encountered us specifically..."

"Maintain vigilance! Do not let your guard down!"

...

Hearing the words of the little person, Sun Erlang couldn't help but feel ashamed. His actions were indeed a bit crude. However, he quickly thought of a way to compensate.

Sun Erlang pointed towards the closest planet to the reverse-thrust ship.

Not long after, the planet dramatically disintegrated.

Transforming into countless pieces of gravel, they rained down like a torrential downpour towards the reverse-thrust ship.

What happens once cannot be repeated.

With such a dense cluster of gravel, and precisely guided.

The reverse-thrust ship naturally had no hope of survival.

In the collision, it transformed into a ball of flame and disappeared into the starry sky.

However, an accident could not extinguish the natives' curiosity about the starry sky.

Subsequently, increasingly larger and more advanced reverse-thrust ships flew out from the original planet,

Exploring in all directions.

Although he really wanted to, using the same method to destroy all these flying ships again. But Sun Erlang knew that his previous actions had already shaken the rules of this creation game.

If he continued to intervene directly, this world would collapse even faster.

So Sun Erlang had to find another way.

He looked at the countless flying ships bouncing off the star halos and soon had an idea.

With a thought, the star halos on the original planet underwent a subtle, imperceptible change.

It took the natives more than a year to notice something was wrong.

Extreme weather conditions, such as blizzards and droughts, swept across the planet.

Crop yields decreased, and even the native birth rate began to decline slightly.

The little people sensed that something was amiss and gathered the most elite scholars on the planet to study the cause of these disasters.

Finally, they reached a conclusion.

Although the star halos confined them and prevented them from venturing into the star sea,

They also served as a protective shield,

Isolating the planet from the extreme environments of the star sea.

And in recent years, due to the overuse of the star halo's elasticity, the star halo had suffered slight wear and tear.

Although this reduction was negligible to the star halo itself.

The planet's fragile ecosystem could not withstand its impact.

After a heated discussion, the native inhabitants finally gave up their plan to explore the star sea for the time being.

The reverse-thrust ships were thus sealed away.

"We can hold on for a while longer."

Sun Erlang couldn't help but breathe a sigh of relief.

"I wonder how much time has passed in the real world outside."

He looked at the star river he had personally shaped before him, his expression becoming somewhat dazed.

Time flew by.

In the blink of an eye, another hundred years passed on the original planet.

Starting from the third decade, flying ships began to approach the star halos, collecting samples for research.

In the fifth decade, after the unremitting efforts of all the little people, they finally found a method to repair the damage to the star halos.

Sun Erlang personally witnessed these little people recreating the power of the star halos in the laboratory.

His heart was deeply shaken, and countless thoughts surged in his mind.

"The power of the star halos comes from the foundation of the laws of the world I created."

"But these little people are also manifestations of the laws of this world. As parts of the same world, they have the ability to explore the fundamental origins of the world..."

"Because they are real, they can be studied and utilized."

...

The changes on the original planet continued.

After multiple trials, the little people confirmed the effectiveness of repairing the star halos. Those who had been suppressed for so long finally couldn't bear it any longer.

An unprecedented era of exploration arrived.

Countless reverse-thrust ships once again sailed away from the original planet, exploring the endless star sea.

In the seventh decade, the little people invented a method of long-distance travel that did not rely on the star halos' elasticity, but only on the star halo power core.

From then on, the natives officially achieved the ability to travel back and forth in the star sea.

From the eighth decade to the hundredth year, the little people entered a new era of exploring and colonizing the star sea.

At this point, Sun Erlang knew that it was only a matter of time before his fabricated world was exposed.

Looking at the countless little people who were still sacrificing themselves for this cause, Sun Erlang felt an inexplicable emotion.

He no longer tried to expand the boundaries of the star sea.

Instead, he silently watched as the footprints of the little people reached the edge of the world.

Five hundred years later.

When a strangely shaped reverse-thrust ship finally reached the edge of the star sea,

The world before Sun Erlang's eyes suddenly began to shake.

Boom!

Like exploding stars, brilliant light erupted.

It disappeared.

But Sun Erlang did not return to the real world.

Before him was still a blank expanse.

"Hmm?"

Sun Erlang was somewhat surprised and looked around, not knowing what had happened.

"Do you think there was anything wrong with that world just now?"

A voice suddenly sounded from behind Sun Erlang.

Sun Erlang's heart skipped a beat, and he immediately turned his head.

He saw a Taoist priest with long eyebrows and white hair, holding a whisk, smiling and looking at him.

"This is..."

Sun Erlang vaguely guessed the identity of this person and tentatively said, "Greetings, Heavenly Venerate."

The Taoist priest did not respond, continuing to smile and look at Sun Erlang.

Sun Erlang pondered for a moment, recalling the civilization of the little people on the original planet.

After a while, he suddenly realized, "There was something wrong."

"The little people on that planet..."

"They are too united."

"There were no major wars or internal strife. Even when the planet faced a crisis, they could always put aside their differences and work together to resolve it."

"..."

"Compared to the current situation in the Xuanhuang Realm, it's truly unbelievable."

Sun Erlang shook his head.

The Taoist priest nodded and then asked, "This is one point. Are there any others?"

"The obsession of the little people with exploring the star sea is a bit too deep."

"Even after facing multiple dangers, they never gave up.

"Even the highest echelon of the entire planet shares the same belief..."

Sun Erlang looked at the Taoist priest.

"This may be difficult to imagine in the real world."

Chapter 1248: Reversing the Xuanhuang Principle

Hearing Sun Erlang's words, the white-haired Taoist priest smiled slightly.

"Indeed, everyone has their own independent personality and thoughts. It is indeed difficult to get everyone to work together wholeheartedly. The events that have occurred in the history of the Xuanhuang Realm indicate this."

The white-haired Taoist priest waved his whisk lightly, and countless images instantly appeared in the pure white space before Sun Erlang.

Black shadows representing the end times hovered over the Xuanhuang Realm, potentially descending at any moment. However, regarding how to deal with this catastrophe, various sects and factions in the Xuanhuang Realm still held different attitudes.

There were those who resolved to abandon the realm and flee, those who chose to be cowardly turtles, those who worked tirelessly to rally everyone to unite, and those who took advantage of the chaos to satisfy their selfish desires.

The beings in the image had no specific appearances, all replaced by faceless little figures.

But the absurd farces being played out were incredibly real.

"But this is the past Xuanhuang Realm."

The white-haired Taoist priest waved his whisk again, and the scene changed dramatically.

"United as one, firm will against fate, openly joining divine power, carefree therefore fearless, one word decides everything..."

As the True Heavenly Venerate spoke, the living scenes from the human territories of the Five Elders Council appeared before Sun Erlang.

"What do you think of this place compared to the Myriad Immortals Alliance?" the True Heavenly Venerate asked.

"It is indeed much better than the Myriad Immortals Alliance," Sun Erlang said without hesitation.

He then added, "Unfortunately, all of this is based on the great divine powers of the five Heavenly Venerates. Everything is as ephemeral as a mirage. If one day, one of these Heavenly Venerates encounters misfortune, this seemingly beautiful scene will instantly collapse."

In the territory of the Five Elders Council, openly discussing the potential demise of a Heavenly Venerate was an act tantamount to treason. However, the white-haired Taoist priest before him did not show any anger.

Instead, he nodded in agreement, "You are indeed somewhat correct, but also entirely incorrect."

Sun Erlang's expression faltered, and he cupped his hands solemnly, "Please enlighten me, Heavenly Venerate."

"The reason you are correct is from the perspective of an outsider cultivator, it is indeed so. The order here is all born from the five Heavenly Venerates. If the Heavenly Venerates were to perish, the order would also vanish."

"The reason you are incorrect is because you do not understand the true meaning of the Longevity Realm."

The True Heavenly Venerate stroked his beard and spoke slowly, "To defy the principles of Heaven and Earth, and thus achieve longevity."

"After cultivators defy the principles, they naturally become a part of the world's principles. Just like sunlight, water droplets, and air, they all constitute the [World] itself."

"Humans are not isolated individuals. Discussing cultivators in the Longevity Realm without negating the existence of the Longevity Realm is also meaningless."

Sun Erlang did not fully understand the True Heavenly Venerate's words.

In his opinion, this was more like a form of sophistry.

However, the Longevity Heavenly Venerate, standing at the pinnacle of this realm, would not engage in petty arguments with a junior like him.

Sun Erlang frowned and pondered carefully.

After a long while, he said thoughtfully, "We are discussing cultivators of the Xuanhuang Realm. This is the fundamental premise. And the Longevity Heavenly Venerates have already become an inseparable part of the Xuanhuang Realm, so..."

"No." Sun Erlang suddenly became vigilant. "The key is that your power does not seem to cover the entire Xuanhuang Realm? It is only confined to this area."

The True Heavenly Venerate asked, "Have you perceived the existence of Carefree Heavenly Venerate's divine power?"

Sun Erlang nodded, "Of course, I am aware of it."

"As fellow cultivators in the Longevity Realm, Carefree's strength is not much stronger than ours. What he can do..."

"We can naturally also do it," the True Heavenly Venerate said slowly.

Upon hearing this, Sun Erlang felt an instinctive disbelief.

Then, as he pondered, his expression gradually became solemn.

"Then why?" he couldn't help but ask.

"Naturally, the time is not yet right." The white-haired Taoist gently waved his whisk.

The white space of the True Fruit Tree gradually faded.

The figure of the True Heavenly Venerate also slowly became blurred.

"Heavenly Venerate!"

Only then did Sun Erlang suddenly remember his Master's instructions and quickly shouted, "Does Heavenly Venerate know about Eastern Pole Heavenly Venerate?"

"You will see."

The white space exploded violently.

wωw ▪ttКan ▪c ○

Countless rays of light erupted simultaneously, blooming in Sun Erlang's mind.

He returned to the real world, but Sun Erlang was still immersed in the images transmitted by the True Heavenly Venerate.

"Defying the principles of Heaven and Earth again? Are you crazy? You've already reached this point, just one step away from defying the principles. If you follow the normal progression, you'll achieve Longevity. Why do this?" The young Taoist's expression was full of confusion, his words intense.

"Longevity? That's merely becoming one with the Dao." The figure opposite him was indistinct, but his tone showed disdain for the [Longevity Realm].

He continued, "If that existence were not present, it would be fine for us to become one with the Dao. But the entire cultivation system is built upon the framework created by him..."

"Xinghan, do you know the consequences?"

The young Taoist remained silent.

"The Xuanhuang Realm is being destroyed and reborn. This is the only thing he cares about right now. Someone achieving Longevity is insignificant to him. In fact, he would even welcome the birth of a Longevity Realm cultivator that meets his expectations. Do you know why?"

The young Taoist continued to lower his head, silent.

"Your talents are no less than mine, so how can you not understand? It's just that you're clinging to a sliver of hope."

"Let me be blunt. One day, when the Xuanhuang Realm welcomes rebirth and completes its transformation, the so-called Longevity Heavenly Venerates will completely become a part of the new world's Heavenly Dao... It's better to live than to die, or rather, it doesn't matter whether you live or die."

"They are all just tools for transforming the world."

The indistinct figure sneered.

"This is just your fantasy, your conjecture..." After a long time, the young Taoist weakly retorted.

But the indistinct figure ignored him and continued, "I refuse to believe it! I must fight against him!"

"To defy the principles of Heaven and Earth and achieve longevity. This is the foundation of his enlightenment, but also his greatest flaw. If one can defy his principles again, one can instantly steal all his creation and replace him..."

"Eastern Pole! You..." The young Taoist nervously looked around, fearing that these heaven-defying words would be overheard by others.

The indistinct figure, full of ambition and confidence, said, "Xinghan, don't be nervous. I am not alone on this path." Just then, Eastern Pole spoke comfortingly.

"In the Immortal-Mortal Miasma, there lies the secret of defying Heaven and Earth again. It originates from the previous Xuanhuang Great Heavenly Venerate who has already passed away..."

"I'm starting to get a clue recently. As long as..."

Boom!

Eastern Pole hadn't finished speaking when the image suddenly shattered.

When his vision cleared again, it was still Eastern Pole's figure.

However...

Eastern Pole, who was originally full of pride and arrogance, looked extremely strange.

His head was bowed, his body naked.

His long hair was scattered, and countless silk threads extended from his body.

Extending into the endless void beyond.

"Eastern Pole!"

This horrifying scene, along with the True Heavenly Venerate's exclamation, suddenly vanished.

...

"What is this?" Sun Erlang's mind was shaken.

Although it was only a brief conversation, the secrets revealed were all earth-shattering.

Sun Erlang first looked around and realized that not much time had passed since he entered the creation illusion of the True Fruit. Currently, there were still cultivators meditating under the fruit, undergoing the test.

But Sun Erlang had no intention of staying here any longer.

He had to return quickly and tell Master everything he had seen and heard.

Fortunately, the attention of the cultivators in the city was focused on the [Heavenly Prodigies] who were still in the illusion.

There wasn't much attention paid to Sun Erlang, the failed participant.

He quietly left the city and headed straight for the entrance of the Great Qi small world.

While flying, Sun Erlang's thoughts raced.

"The True Heavenly Venerate had discovered my whereabouts long ago?"

"Which is why he appeared in the illusion to meet me."

"They already knew about Eastern Pole Heavenly Venerate's situation, and coincidentally, I was sent by Master to come here, so they used me to relay these images to Master..."

"What deeper meaning lies behind this?"

Even though Sun Erlang considered himself experienced, facing the truth about the Xuanhuang Realm's ultimate secrets, he still found it difficult to control himself.

Sun Erlang couldn't help but speed up his pace.

...

In fact, there was no need for him to return to the Great Qi small world personally.

Using the golden net woven from Origin Force essence, the Faceless Saint Emperor had already synchronized his perception of everything that happened to him the moment he entered the True illusion.

Similarly, the True Heavenly Venerate was not really talking to a Harmonious Dao cultivator like Sun Erlang.

Instead, he was communicating with the Faceless Saint Emperor.

Li Ping carefully replayed the images transmitted by the True Heavenly Venerate.

At the same time, the Heavenly Venerate's profound words echoed continuously.

"Tools for transforming the new world by transmitting laws?"

"It seems they have some self-awareness. Seeing me appear and contending with the Law Transmitter, they are subtly expressing goodwill..."

"However, I cannot fully trust them."

Li Ping snorted coldly.

The five Great Heavenly Venerates had indeed become one with the Dao.

But facing the pressure of the Law Transmitter, Li Ping did not believe they would just sit idly by and do nothing after all these years.

"Carefree Paradise, forming its own world."

"Land of Truth, evolving myriad worlds."

"As for the others, they are mostly watching the conflict from the sidelines."

"And those who are truly desperate, like the current Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao, will rush forward at the first sign of hope."

Li Ping's thoughts were very calm, not influenced by the somewhat shocking images from the True Heavenly Venerate.

"However, Eastern Pole Heavenly Venerate's words, that the secret of defying Heaven and Earth again lies hidden within the Immortal-Mortal Miasma... might be true."

"Eastern Pole's Pure Body Spiritual Pool can, like the Xuanhuang Immortal Heart Curse, resolve the defiance of principles caused by Su Bai."

"Defying Heaven and Earth again..."

Li Ping pondered, contemplating these two sentences.

"While we cannot fully entrust our hopes to it, it is still a way to shake the Law Transmitter's power."

Thinking this, Li Ping's figure flickered, and he arrived around Yin Shangren.

Xu Ke was also present.

They were observing a seemingly exquisitely carved little girl, both marveling at her.

Upon seeing Li Ping arrive, Yin Shangren spoke first, "You're here at the right time. Come quickly and look at this little one."

The Saint Emperor's imposing aura and his featureless face made the little girl somewhat nervous.

However, she still mustered the courage to look directly at Li Ping.

His divine sense instantly swept through the little girl's body, and Li Ping was slightly stunned. He transmitted a question, "Didn't you say they all cultivate the new method?"

"Why is this little child cultivating the Law Transmitter's method?"

Xu Ke answered this question with great emotion. "Saint Emperor, please don't misunderstand. No one taught her cultivation methods here. She figured it out herself."

"Moreover, among this batch of children, she is not the only one like this."

Yin Shangren's tone was also somewhat strange. "It is said that when one is desperate, they find a new path. They relied on my imperfect foundation, and seeing their companions constantly improving, in their desperation, they instinctively stumbled upon another path to cultivation."

"To avoid affecting those children who cultivate the new heart-centering method, we can only take them away."

The Faceless Saint Emperor heard this and remained silent.

This time, using Origin Force essence to scan the children's bodies revealed their specific conditions.

"It's not a coincidence."

"The Law Transmitter's method has already become a part of the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao."

"Just like naturally occurring paths in the world, even if you cover your eyes, you will instinctively walk towards this path."

Li Ping recalled the situation in the world created by Sun Erlang not long ago.

"This is the Xuanhuang's [Dao]. The supreme Dao, even the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao itself, cannot escape its influence."

"Following this Dao, one can achieve the highest attainment within the realm, which is Longevity."

"Defying the Dao..."

"It's either you die, or I die."

Li Ping's vision flashed with the image of Eastern Pole's bizarre, puppet-like body.

But Li Ping felt no fear or hesitation in his heart.

"Su Bai, Eastern Pole, they will lose..."

"But that doesn't mean I will!"

"The Law Transmitter is indeed powerful, but not invincible."

Li Ping's train of thought remained unchanged.

"To successfully defy the Dao, first, defy its principles again and disrupt its foundation."

"Second, use strength to break through the situation with superior strength. The Law Transmitter's Dao is indeed supreme in the Xuanhuang Realm. However, there is more than one Xuanhuang Realm in the world. Beyond the world lies the Sea of Stars. Beyond the Sea of Stars lies the High Wall..."

Li Ping's thoughts raced, and at the same time, he stated his purpose to Yin Shangren and Xu Ke.

"Immortal-Mortal Miama?"

Yin Shangren found it strange that Li Ping suddenly brought up this subject, which he had researched before.

"Mr. Bai paid with his life to achieve the reversal of principles. Because he was deeply favored by the Heavenly Dao, the greater the entanglement, the greater the backlash. Ultimately, he could not escape and returned his Dao to Heaven..."

Yin Shangren explained.

"Since it has already defied the principles, why can it be dispelled?"

"Doesn't this mean that every process of dispelling the Immortal-Mortal Miasma is equivalent to defying the principles of Heaven and Earth again?"

Li Ping asked calmly.

This was a question Yin Shangren had never considered before, and he stood there in a daze.

Chapter 1249: Mr. Bai's Gift

"Defying the principles, defying the principles..."

"Could it really be like this?"

Yin Shangren stood stunned for a long time, then began to tremble uncontrollably.

Xu Ke's aged face also showed excitement. "No wonder Mr. Bai always said all I needed was to wait."

"Besides the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao descending to save itself, countless mortals are also constantly embarking on the path of cultivation. The process of cultivation is the process of reversing the principles of the Immortal-Mortal Miasma. After thousands of years, the accumulation..."

The Faceless Saint Emperor's voice was ethereal. "It's not that the process of dispelling the Immortal-Mortal Miasma is simple in the eyes of cultivators. The initial steps and prerequisites for cultivation are essentially the same as the ultimate goal of achieving Longevity."

"It is also defying the principles of Heaven and Earth."

Upon hearing this, complex emotions flickered in Yin Shangren and Xu Ke's eyes.

Yin Shangren said, "If the Heavenly Venerate of Reversal were still alive, it would not be so easy for mortals in the Xuanhuang Realm to defy the principles of Heaven and Earth and embark on the path of cultivation. But precisely because Mr. Bai has passed away, the restrictions of the Immortal-Mortal Miasma have been greatly weakened."

Li Ping interjected at this point, "Moreover, Eastern Pole Heavenly Venerate foresaw the mysteries of this place. Using the Net Body Spiritual Pool formation, he further reduced the difficulty of defying the principles."

Xu Ke's lips moved, and after a long struggle, he managed to speak, "The last time I saw Mr. Bai, I saw the death wish in his heart. I haven't been able to let go of it all these years, but now, perhaps I understand a little."

Yin Shangren fell into mumbling again, "Everyone is defying the principles of Heaven and Earth, but in essence, this is still within the cultivation system created by the Law Transmitter. Even if we know this, what use is it?"

"There must be something we haven't thought of..."

Li Ping spoke with certainty. "The answer should lie within the Immortal-Mortal Miasma. When it comes to researching the Immortal-Mortal Miasma, perhaps no one in the Xuanhuang Realm currently knows more than you. I'm afraid it will be a bit more strenuous for you."

"Although there are no longer any mortals carrying the Immortal-Mortal Miasma within the Great Qi, it is not difficult to find some from the conquered small worlds for research. I will have people fully cooperate with you." Li Ping said to Yin Shangren.

"Saint Emperor, please rest assured." Yin Shangren suddenly became excited.

...

Meanwhile.

In the Derivation Law Jade space within the Myriad Immortals Alliance.

After the Saint Embryo encountered the Remnant Realm Great Wall, Li Ping's original calm heart was once again stirred.

"Defying the principles of Heaven and Earth again? Immortal-Mortal Miasma..."

Li Ping suddenly recalled his experience of dispelling the Immortal-Mortal Miasma in the Pure Body Spiritual Pool formation on Glazed Island back then.

The lava-like hot pool water ravaged his consciousness. Even with a firm will, he eventually fell into a state of ignorance and oblivion.

His mind became blank, acting solely on instinct.

Before entering the Spiritual Pool, Li Ping, who had been cultivating the Xuanhuang Pure Heart Curse day and night, instinctively reactivated the technique.

While completely dispelling the miasma within his body, Li Ping inexplicably comprehended an advanced and elevated version of the Xuanhuang Pure Heart Curse.

The Xuanhuang Heart Refining Curse.

And then it evolved into the current Xuanhuang Immortal Heart Curse. This technique had been of immense help to Li Ping throughout his journey.

"The suffering in the Pure Body Spiritual Pool is unbearable for ordinary people. Most would fall into a coma, and even if they remained conscious, they would be unable to accommodate any other distracting thoughts amidst such extreme pain."

"Embrace the Dao, cleanse the mind, emulate nature..."

His eyes closed tightly, but a flash of inspiration crossed Li Ping's mind.

"Humans merge with the Dao. Instinctive actions in a state of ignorance and oblivion are precisely the closest to the Dao. This might be why so many mortals in the world can successfully dispel the Immortal-Mortal Miasma and defy the principles of Heaven and Earth again."

"However, this is not defying the principles in the true sense. The fact that their strength did not leap significantly after dispelling the Immortal-Mortal Miasma proves this point."

Li Ping pondered and contemplated.

"Firstly, it's because the Immortal-Mortal Miasma was not dispelled entirely by their own power. Secondly..."

The Dao-Transformation Stone flashed in his mind, and Li Ping recalled the moment of enlightenment, savoring it repeatedly.

"When the Immortal-Mortal Miasma was finally dispelled..."

"It was as if it disappeared on its own."

"Just like sensing my cultivation of the Xuanhuang Pure Heart Curse, it spontaneously transformed into the Heart Refining Curse."

"Did it trigger some condition?"

Li Ping recalled the scene of Eastern Pole's life before his death, transmitted by the True Heavenly Venerate.

"The secret of defying Heaven and Earth again lies hidden within the Immortal-Mortal Miasma."

In Li Ping's eyes, he saw countless mortals over thousands of years breaking the shackles between immortals and mortals, and embarking on the path of cultivation.

"The birth of every cultivator is a process close to defying the principles of Heaven and Earth again."

"Even if they are unaware of it, this is a true occurrence."

"To defy Heaven and Earth again is tantamount to directly confronting the Law Transmitter and completely overturning the cultivation system he personally created. Figures like Mr. Bai and Eastern Pole, who were Heavenly Prodigies, also ended in failure. This shows the immense difficulty. But..."

Li Ping suddenly realized.

He recalled the simulation process of his own repeated reincarnations.

"The process of every mortal resisting the Immortal-Mortal Miasma can be seen as a simulation of defying the principles of Heaven and Earth again."

"The strength of one person may have limits. The strength of tens of thousands of people also has its limits."

"But tens of thousands of people, stretching over countless years, create infinite power."

"Facing such immense power, the new method created by the Law Transmitter is bound to be broken, it's only a matter of time."

Li Ping's mind trembled. "All beings in all worlds, the masses refining spirits, use pure numbers to shake the power of the transcendent Immortal."

"Endless beings, defying the laws forever, this magnifies the advantage of numbers over time, achieving a qualitative leap from quantitative change..."

"As long as there are individuals in the Xuanhuang Realm who refuse to accept their mortal fate, this method will continue indefinitely."

Li Ping's thoughts raced, and he felt even more genuine respect for Mr. Bai, who created such a marvelous method.

Ignoring the limit of lifespan, his methods still took effect after his death, spanning across time and influencing events many years later.

Unlike Li Ping, who possessed the True Return Treasure, this was the limit that ordinary mortal cultivators could possibly achieve.

Of course, this was of little use to Li Ping personally.

However, this did not prevent Li Ping from harvesting Mr. Bai's achievements.

"In my opinion, the secret of defying the principles of Heaven and Earth again, hidden within the Immortal-Mortal Miasma, is the enlightenment gained by countless cultivators while dispelling the Immortal-Mortal Miasma over the years."

"All of it has been recorded and preserved."

"If one could absorb these simulated experiences of defying Heaven and Earth again and again..."

Li Ping considered himself capable of remaining indifferent to most treasures in the Xuanhuang Realm now, even Cat Treasure from beyond the High Wall. However, he had to admit that he was deeply moved upon sensing these countless experiences of defying principles.

Unlike magical artifacts, this 'gift package' was something that could directly enhance Li Ping's soul essence.

It was enough to significantly shorten the gap between him and the Law Transmitter and the Heavenly Physician.

Although it was a one-time benefit, it was of great significance to Li Ping, and the sooner he discovered it, the better.

"It could at least save me three lifetimes of reincarnation time."

Li Ping calculated in his heart.

"Then, where did Mr. Bai hide this grand gift package?"

"Is it within the Immortal Mirror, or within the power of the Immortal-Mortal Miasma? Does it require any special conditions to be triggered?"

If it weren't for the fact that he had already decided on the strategy of 'watching the tigers fight' in this life, Li Ping would have been desperate to go in person and investigate.

However, years of experience had allowed him to suppress this impulse.

"With Yin Shangren and Xu Ke working hard together to research it, it will be more efficient than me fumbling around blindly."

"If they find out, it's equivalent to me finding out. Anyway, it will all be mine in the end, no need to rush."

"I can also see how much weight this gift package holds. After the Saint Emperor's clone absorbs it, can he really shake the Law Transmitter?"

"Hehehe, it really makes me look forward to it."

After being confined in the Derivation Law Jade space for a long time, Li Ping, who felt bored, was now full of emotion.

...

The perspective returns to the Saint Emperor clone.

Understanding the secrets left by Mr. Bai was not something that could be accomplished in a day or two.

Before that, Li Ping's appointment with Ruo Mu had arrived.

The Saint Emperor once again arrived outside the Black Abyss and White Flowers.

He did not act carelessly despite possessing an absolute advantage. To prevent Ruo Mu from making a desperate struggle, Origin Force essence was silently deployed around him to form a protective layer.

Then, Li Ping stepped back into the Tortoise Longevity space.

Perhaps it was due to Li Ping's nourishment last time, or perhaps Ruo Mu himself saw hope.

This time, in the lifeless, despairing yellow space, Li Ping actually felt a trace of vitality.

Although extremely weak, the appearance of this trace of vitality, which should not have existed, already indicated certain problems.

Li Ping also discovered something different from before.

The cultivators hanging on Ruo Mu's branches...

They had all disappeared.

"Greetings, Saint Emperor."

The old Taoist priest smiled and appeared before Li Ping.

Ruo Mu noticed the direction of Li Ping's gaze and, without waiting for Li Ping to ask, actively explained, "Since I have decided to pledge allegiance to you, I naturally need to make some changes. It is indeed good to get rid of actions like senseless rage from the past."

"Don't get me wrong, after seeing so many 'human flesh fruits', I'm actually getting a bit tired of it."

Li Ping said calmly, "Where are they now?"

Ruo Mu chuckled, "Naturally, they have returned their Dao to Heaven."

As he spoke, Ruo Mu handed over a leaf.

The leaf was green and yellow, and upon closer inspection, it contained a universe within. It held piles of various Golden Cores.

These Golden Cores looked as if they were dissolving, incomplete.

Li Ping vaguely saw the shapes of exotic items from Heaven and Earth within the core of the Golden Cores.

"I am a spiritual being of Heaven and Earth, in charge of the Xuanhuang's life and death authority. Although the authority is gradually being reclaimed, my connection with the Heavenly Dao has never been broken."

Ruo Mu looked at Li Ping, then continued, "Through my absorption and transformation, the Heaven and Earth power usurped by the cultivators can be returned to Heaven and Earth more quickly."

"As you can see, I have not embezzled anything."

Li Ping withdrew his gaze from the leaf. "I believe you are not that foolish. Compared to my reward, these are insignificant."

Ruo Mu nodded repeatedly, expressing his agreement.

"Come here." Li Ping suddenly spoke.

The old Taoist hesitated for a moment, but ultimately walked slowly towards the Faceless Saint Emperor.

Compared to Li Ping's three-zhang-three-cun imposing figure, the hunched Taoist appeared as small as an infant.

Li Ping gently placed his palm on Ruo Mu's head.

Boom!

The scene before Ruo Mu's eyes instantly shattered.

In an instant, he felt as if he had left this Tortoise Longevity space.

He arrived in the endless dark starry sky.

A golden vortex, like a galaxy, revolved majestically.

And in the center of the vortex, the majestic figure of the Faceless Saint Emperor could be vaguely seen.

That powerful and sacred aura seemed to surpass even the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao known to Ruo Mu.

As one of the oldest beings in the Xuanhuang Realm, Ruo Mu naturally knew what this power represented.

The last bit of dissatisfaction in his heart gradually disappeared.

Ruo Mu revealed his true form, no longer the ugly old Taoist, but a withered, seemingly malnourished sapling.

In front of the vast golden vortex galaxy, he was like an ant.

His branches swayed gently, a sign of Ruo Mu's submission.

The Faceless Saint Emperor's figure rapidly expanded, instantly filling Ruo Mu's entire field of vision.

The golden galaxy also exploded with a bang.

Endless starlight engulfed Ruo Mu.

When Ruo Mu awoke from the illusion, Li Ping's figure had already vanished.

"Wait patiently."

"When you are needed, you will be summoned."

Only Li Ping's voice echoed persistently in his mind.

And Li Ping's promise back then was not broken.

Ruo Mu clearly felt that his connection with the Xuanhuang Realm was slowly being restored.

Although it was impossible to return to his former peak state,

He still had hope for the future.

And...

Ruo Mu looked down at his palm.

Besides the original green leaf, there was now inexplicably a small green bottle.

It was clearly left by the Faceless Saint Emperor before he left.

A mental control technique naturally appeared in his mind. Ruo Mu followed suit, like drawing a gourd, and opened the small green bottle.

A stream of pure vitality emerged from the green bottle.

Although it could not compare to the nourishment provided directly by the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao, for Ruo Mu in his current state, it was definitely a great bổ.

Ruo Mu greedily swallowed all the vitality in the green bottle.

Only when not a single drop could be poured out did he reluctantly stop.

However, Ruo Mu sensed that the vitality in this small green bottle had not completely disappeared.

Instead, it was slowly regenerating on its own.

What surprised Ruo Mu even more was that the generation of vitality did not require the small green bottle to draw energy from the outside.

It was as if the vitality was completely generated by the green bottle itself.

"Truly a good treasure."

Ruo Mu smacked his lips unceremoniously.

"It doesn't seem to be from the Xuanhuang Realm..."

Ruo Mu pondered for a moment, then chuckled.

"Why worry about that? As long as there's food and drink."

"It can't be worse than before, right?"

Only after losing something did one realize its preciousness.

If anyone dared to try and take these things away again...

Even if that person were the Law Transmitter, he, Ruo Mu, would dare to take a bite.

Chapter 1250: Stone Slab Falls into the Pond

The Earth Vein Ancient Tree was also within the Faceless Saint Emperor's Origin Force essence net.

Therefore, after Ruo Mu surrendered, the Earth Vein Ancient Tree vaguely sensed it. However, it could not confirm, and its fear and unease only grew daily.

"Now we are all subordinates of the Saint Emperor. With the Saint Emperor's protection, how could he possibly do anything to me?" the Ancient Tree could only console itself.

The Earth Vein Ancient Tree knew very well that perhaps only the Saint Emperor could save its life.

And the more useful it was to the Sacred Dynasty, the safer it would be.

Thus, the Earth Vein Ancient Tree eagerly wanted to prove its worth to the Saint Emperor.

Unfortunately, ever since arriving at the Sacred Dynasty of Great Qi, it felt as if it had been forgotten. No one actively sought it out.

Even the task entrusted to it earlier, to sort out the Earth Veins of Great Qi's small world, had not been inspected.

This made the Earth Vein Ancient Tree quite dejected.

However, one day, the opportunity the Ancient Tree had been waiting for finally arrived.

It was Ou Shangtian, the fifth disciple of the Saint Emperor.

"This is the diagram of the Xuanhuang Realm's Earth Vein currents?"

Ou Shangtian pointed at the image before him and asked.

A dense, intricate network, extending to all corners of the Xuanhuang Realm.

Like blood vessels in a human body, they seemed to contract and pulse, looking quite bizarre.

The Earth Vein Ancient Tree nodded, "Young Master, you see correctly."

Ou Shangtian seemed quite pleased with the Ancient Tree's flattery and readily accepted the title of "Young Master."

"I heard from Senior Sister Lin Ling that when traveling through the Earth Vein currents, the Xuanhuang Heavenly Dao's power naturally conceals them, making it difficult for ordinary people to detect. Is that true?" Ou Shangtian asked again.

"Indeed." The Earth Vein Ancient Tree handed over a withered branch. "Young Master, please take a look."

Ou Shangtian felt the Earth Vein current power surging within the withered branch and frowned slightly. "I don't see anything particularly special about this. How can it shield others' perception?"

The Earth Vein Ancient Tree smiled slightly, "Young Master, you must understand that gathering sands can form a high tower, and dripping water can form a river. A single point of Earth Vein power may seem insignificant. But when the Earth Vein currents of the entire Xuanhuang Realm converge, it becomes truly vast and majestic, like the might of thunder."

"Ultimately, the flow of Earth Veins is an important part of the normal operation of the Xuanhuang Realm. I am merely holding its reins on its behalf. Compared to the overwhelming principles of the entire Xuanhuang Realm, ordinary cultivators are naturally overlooked."

Ou Shangtian gazed blankly at the Earth Vein current diagram, lost in thought.

After a long while, he came back to his senses, returned the Earth Vein withered branch, and instructed, "Coincidentally, I am going out on a mission assigned by Master this time, and I might need your help."

The Earth Vein Ancient Tree had been waiting for this. Upon hearing this, it was overjoyed. "Young Master, please command me. I will definitely assist you with all my heart."

"In the Xuanhuang Realm, there is an immensely powerful senior, carrying a stone tablet on his back... Do you know of him?" Ou Shangtian asked, looking at the Earth Vein Ancient Tree.

The Earth Vein Ancient Tree's expression suddenly changed. The previous eagerness instantly vanished.

It stared at Ou Shangtian in disbelief for a long time before tentatively asking, "Young Master, is the Sacred Dynasty planning to take action against Senior Stone Tablet?"

"If I may be so bold, that Stone Tablet is a true Longevity Realm cultivator, and has been enlightened for many years..."

Ou Shangtian impatiently waved his hand. "I naturally know the strength of that so-called Stone Tablet. Longevity Realm, indeed!"

"Compared to Master, it's nothing!"

"Don't worry, I am only responsible for luring him to a specific location."

Upon hearing Ou Shangtian's words, the Earth Vein Ancient Tree was slightly relieved.

Since the mysterious Faceless Saint Emperor could subdue its father, it should be able to deal with this Stone Tablet without issues.

The Ancient Tree became invigorated. "Young Master, how may I cooperate?"

Ou Shangtian explained the detailed plan. The Ancient Tree pondered and nodded, indicating that it was not a problem.

"There's no time to delay. After I meet Master, I will set off immediately."

The Ancient Tree stated, "My main body is still in the Xuanhuang Realm. As long as Young Master summons me, I can appear at any time."

Ou Shangtian hurried into the Saint Emperor's Throne.

When he emerged, the anxiety on his face had completely disappeared.

"I have the Kunqian Bone Hand, and the Seven-Colored Jade Void Flowing Light protects my body. I have even received a treasure bestowed by Master this time. And I have studied formations for so long..."

"I only need to lure him to the Fishing Pond, and the mission will be complete. It should not be a problem."

"But isn't the Fishing Pond our Sacred Dynasty's treasure? Why would Master ask me to lure the great enemy there? Isn't he afraid of any unexpected accidents?"

Ou Shangtian couldn't understand no matter how hard he thought.

However, in the end, he couldn't be bothered to think about it anymore. He left the Great Qi small world and headed straight for the Nine Mountains Prefecture of the Myriad Immortals Alliance.

Relying on the surging Earth Vein currents, it only took the time to brew a cup of tea to reach the Nine Mountains Prefecture.

Ou Shangtian tried it out. As expected, the spatial laws here were somewhat chaotic and fragile.

If he rashly used the teleportation technique, he might directly tear the space and be sucked into the spatial turbulence, never to be found again.

"However, flight is not a problem. These nine mountain peaks can stump ordinary cultivators, but not me with the Seven-Colored Divine Light."

Thinking this, Ou Shangtian deliberately controlled the Seven-Colored Jade Void Flowing Light to form a protective layer around his body. Like a blazing sun in the sky, it constantly emitted its own rhythm outwards.

With a thought, an armor that also emitted a seven-colored glow suddenly appeared on Ou Shangtian's body.

Master's words echoed in Ou Shangtian's ears at the same time: "This item is called [Flowing Light Armor], refined from the Nine Heavens Thunderclap and the Morning Breath Rainbow Neon. After wearing it, your flight speed can rival that of lightning, and it can ignore most types of attacks..."

Ou Shangtian tried it out.

Looking at the summit of the mountain range far ahead, in just a moment's daze, he found himself on the mountaintop the next instant.
